speaker: A
sentence: I have been waiting for one hour. This is not my food.
zh: 我等了一个小时了。这不是我的餐。

speaker: B
sentence: I am sorry, sir. Let me see the order number.
zh: 对不起，先生。让我看看订单号。

speaker: A
sentence: The number is 58. But this bag has number 72.
zh: 号码是58。但这个袋子是72号。

speaker: B
sentence: You are right. I made a mistake. I am very sorry.
zh: 您说得对。我搞错了。非常抱歉。

speaker: A
sentence: I am angry because I have no time to cook now.
zh: 我很生气，因为我现在没时间做饭了。

speaker: B
sentence: I will go back to the store and get your food quickly.
zh: 我回店里去拿您的餐，很快回来。

speaker: A
sentence: How long will that take? I have to eat before eight.
zh: 那要多久？我八点前得吃完。

speaker: B
sentence: About twenty minutes. I will run all the way.
zh: 大概二十分钟。我一路跑过去。

speaker: A
sentence: Twenty minutes is too long. I am very hungry now.
zh: 二十分钟太久了。我现在很饿。

speaker: B
sentence: I can give you this wrong food for free, and still get yours.
zh: 我可以免费给您这份错的餐，同时去拿您的。

speaker: A
sentence: But this food is not what I ordered. I need my soup.
zh: 但这不是我点的。我要我的汤。

speaker: B
sentence: I understand. I will call the store to make your order first.
zh: 我明白。我打电话让店里先做您的单。

speaker: B
sentence: They will start cooking now. Then I will bring it to you.
zh: 他们现在就开始做。然后我给您送来。

speaker: A
sentence: That is better. But please be quick. I have work after dinner.
zh: 那好一点。但请快点。我吃完还要工作。

speaker: B
sentence: I promise it will be ready in fifteen minutes.
zh: 我保证十五分钟内准备好。

speaker: A
sentence: Alright. I will wait a little more. But no more mistakes.
zh: 好吧。我再等一会儿。但别再出错了。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you for your understanding. I am very sorry for the trouble.
zh: 谢谢您的理解。给您添麻烦了，很抱歉。

speaker: A
sentence: I accept your apology. Just get me my food.
zh: 我接受你的道歉。快去拿我的餐吧。

speaker: B
sentence: I will go now. Please wait at your door.
zh: 我现在就去。请在门口等着。

speaker: A
sentence: I will be here. Do not make me wait again.
zh: 我就在这儿。别再让我等了。

speaker: B
sentence: I will be back soon. Your soup will be hot.
zh: 我很快就回来。您的汤会是热的。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will get a glass of water while I wait.
zh: 好。我等的时候喝杯水。

speaker: B
sentence: I am at the store now. Your order is being made.
zh: 我到店里了。您的餐正在做。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I am still at the door.
zh: 好。我还在门口。

speaker: B
sentence: I have your food. I am coming to your house now.
zh: 我拿到您的餐了。现在正往您家走。

speaker: A
sentence: I see you. You are at the corner.
zh: 我看到你了。你在拐角处。

speaker: B
sentence: Here is your order. I am sorry for the wait.
zh: 这是您的订单。抱歉让您久等了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. This is my food. I am happy now.
zh: 谢谢。这是我的餐。我现在高兴了。

speaker: B
sentence: I am glad. Have a good night. Goodbye.
zh: 我很高兴。晚安。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning! The sun is out today.
zh: 早上好！今天出太阳了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, a good day for a walk. Is this your dog?
zh: 是啊，适合散步。这是你的狗吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is new. It is a small dog, only three months.
zh: 对，新养的。是小狗，才三个月。

speaker: B
sentence: It looks a little frightened. Is this its first time out?
zh: 它看起来有点害怕。是第一次出门吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is. It is shaking a bit. I hope it will be calm.
zh: 是的。它在发抖。希望它能安静下来。

speaker: B
sentence: My cat is used to the park. See, it is walking slowly.
zh: 我的猫习惯了公园。看，它走得很慢。

speaker: A
sentence: Your cat is very quiet. Does it like other animals?
zh: 你的猫很安静。它喜欢其他动物吗？

speaker: B
sentence: It is friendly. It has met dogs before. Let them get near.
zh: 它很友好。以前见过狗。让它们靠近吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Be careful. My dog may be scared and make a noise.
zh: 小心点。我的狗可能会害怕叫起来。

speaker: B
sentence: It is all right. My cat will not run. It is used to noise.
zh: 没事。我的猫不会跑。它习惯了吵闹。

speaker: A
sentence: Look, they are sniffing each other. That is a good sign.
zh: 看，它们在互相闻。这是个好兆头。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Your dog is less nervous now. It is a good start.
zh: 是的。你的狗现在不那么紧张了。好的开始。

speaker: A
sentence: I have some water for my dog. Do you need any for your cat?
zh: 我带了水给狗。你的猫需要水吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. I have a small bowl. Let me give it some.
zh: 谢谢。我有个小碗。我来给它倒点。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the water. My dog is drinking now. It is happy.
zh: 给你水。我的狗在喝了。它很高兴。

speaker: B
sentence: My cat is drinking too. They are getting along well.
zh: 我的猫也在喝。它们相处得很好。

speaker: A
sentence: I have some dog food. Can your cat eat some?
zh: 我有一些狗粮。你的猫能吃吗？

speaker: B
sentence: No, it only eats cat food. But thank you for the offer.
zh: 不，它只吃猫粮。但谢谢你的好意。

speaker: A
sentence: I see. My dog is eating its food. It is very hungry.
zh: 明白了。我的狗在吃粮。它很饿。

speaker: B
sentence: After eating, they will be more relaxed. Let them rest.
zh: 吃完后它们会更放松。让它们休息一下。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, my dog is sitting down now. It looks tired.
zh: 嗯，我的狗坐下了。看起来累了。

speaker: B
sentence: My cat is washing its face. That means it is comfortable.
zh: 我的猫在洗脸。这说明它很自在。

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I was worried about the first walk.
zh: 那就好。我之前还担心第一次散步呢。

speaker: B
sentence: It is normal. Every animal needs time to get used to things.
zh: 正常。每个动物都需要时间适应。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help. Your cat is a good example.
zh: 谢谢你的帮助。你的猫是个好榜样。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. It is nice to have company in the park.
zh: 不客气。公园里有伴真好。

speaker: A
sentence: I need to go home now. My dog is sleepy.
zh: 我现在得回家了。我的狗困了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is a good time to go. The sun is getting stronger.
zh: 嗯，是该走了。太阳越来越大了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will come again tomorrow. Maybe we will meet here.
zh: 我明天还会来。也许我们能在这儿碰面。

speaker: B
sentence: That would be nice. Have a good rest. Goodbye.
zh: 那太好了。好好休息。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: It is Wednesday night. My friend said this program is good for work.
zh: 周三晚上。朋友说这个软件对工作有帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it will help you make a list of your work for the week.
zh: 是的，它能帮你列出这周的工作。

speaker: A
sentence: I have taken the program from the store. What do I do now?
zh: 我已经从商店下载了软件。现在该做什么？

speaker: B
sentence: Open it. It will make a picture on your machine.
zh: 打开它。它会在你的手机上显示一个图标。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the picture. It is a blue square.
zh: 我看到图标了。是个蓝色方块。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Put your name in the first box.
zh: 好。在第一个框里输入你的名字。

speaker: A
sentence: I put my name. It says I need a secret word.
zh: 我输入了名字。它说需要密码。

speaker: B
sentence: Make a secret word with numbers and letters.
zh: 用数字和字母设置一个密码。

speaker: A
sentence: I made it. Now what is the next step?
zh: 我设好了。下一步是什么？

speaker: B
sentence: See the button at the top? It says 'new list'.
zh: 看到顶部的按钮了吗？写着“新列表”。

speaker: A
sentence: I see it. I will put my work for Monday.
zh: 我看到了。我要添加周一的工作。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Write the first work: send a paper to the office.
zh: 对。写第一项：给办公室发文件。

speaker: A
sentence: I wrote it. There is a button to make it done.
zh: 我写了。有个按钮可以标记完成。

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. After you do the work, you push it.
zh: 没错。做完工作后点它。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a red button for Tuesday. What is that?
zh: 我看到了周二的红色按钮。那是什么？

speaker: B
sentence: That is for important work. Use it for the meeting.
zh: 那是标记重要工作的。用在会议上。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put the meeting on Tuesday with a red mark.
zh: 我把周二的会议标红。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now you have two works in the list.
zh: 好。现在列表里有两项了。

speaker: A
sentence: I need to add more for the week.
zh: 我需要添加更多这周的工作。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Put the work for Wednesday: get the new paper.
zh: 对。添加周三的工作：取新文件。

speaker: A
sentence: Done. And for Thursday, I will make a call.
zh: 好了。周四我要打个电话。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now you have a full list for the week.
zh: 好。现在你有了整周的列表。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a button to send the list to my machine.
zh: 我看到了一个发送列表到手机的按钮。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, so you can see it anywhere.
zh: 对，这样你随时都能看到。

speaker: A
sentence: I will send it now. It is done.
zh: 我现在发送。完成了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. You have your first list ready.
zh: 好。你的第一个列表准备好了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help. This will make my week better.
zh: 谢谢你的帮助。这会让我的这周更顺利。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Use it every day. Goodbye.
zh: 不客气。每天用。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: Excuse me, I am looking for a coffee house on this street.
zh: 不好意思，我在找这条街上的咖啡馆。

speaker: B
sentence: There are two coffee houses here. Which one do you need?
zh: 这里有两家咖啡馆。你要找哪一家？

speaker: A
sentence: It is the one near a book store. My friend is waiting there.
zh: 是书店附近那家。我朋友在那儿等我。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. Go straight two blocks, then turn right.
zh: 明白了。直走两个路口，然后右转。

speaker: A
sentence: Is it on the left or right side of the street?
zh: 那是在街的左边还是右边？

speaker: B
sentence: It is on the left, across from a green park.
zh: 在左边，对面是一个绿色的公园。

speaker: A
sentence: My phone has no power, so I cannot see the map.
zh: 我手机没电了，所以看不了地图。

speaker: B
sentence: That is not a problem. I will give you directions.
zh: 没问题。我告诉你路线。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. Please go slowly so I can keep it in mind.
zh: 谢谢。请说慢一点，我好记住。

speaker: B
sentence: First, go straight to the traffic lights.
zh: 首先，直走到红绿灯。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I see the lights from here.
zh: 好的，我从这儿能看到红绿灯。

speaker: B
sentence: Turn right at the lights, then walk for three minutes.
zh: 在红绿灯右转，然后走三分钟。

speaker: A
sentence: After that, is the coffee house on the same street?
zh: 之后，咖啡馆就在同一条街上吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, you will see a book store on the corner.
zh: 是的，你会看到拐角处有一家书店。

speaker: A
sentence: The coffee house is next to the book store, is that right?
zh: 咖啡馆就在书店旁边，对吗？

speaker: B
sentence: That is correct. It has a red sign outside.
zh: 没错。外面有一个红色招牌。

speaker: A
sentence: Let me say it back: straight, right turn, then near the book store.
zh: 我重复一遍：直走，右转，然后在书店附近。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, you have it right. You will get there quickly.
zh: 是的，你说对了。你很快就会到。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help. I will go now.
zh: 谢谢你的帮助。我现在就走。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. It is not far.
zh: 不客气。不远。

speaker: A
sentence: I will walk quickly so my friend does not wait long.
zh: 我走快一点，这样我朋友就不用等太久。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. The coffee house is a nice place.
zh: 好主意。那家咖啡馆是个好地方。

speaker: A
sentence: I hope my friend is still there. I am a little late.
zh: 希望我朋友还在那儿。我有点晚了。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not worry. You will be there in five minutes.
zh: 别担心。你五分钟就到了。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the red sign now! That must be the place.
zh: 我现在看到红色招牌了！那一定就是。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is the coffee house. Your friend is inside?
zh: 是的，那就是咖啡馆。你朋友在里面吗？

speaker: A
sentence: I think so. I will go in and see. Thank you again!
zh: 我想是的。我进去看看。再次感谢！

speaker: B
sentence: Have a good time with your friend. Goodbye.
zh: 祝你和你朋友玩得开心。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning, teacher.
zh: 老师早上好。

speaker: B
sentence: Good morning. Please take your seat.
zh: 早上好，请坐。

speaker: A
sentence: I put my book on the desk.
zh: 我把书放在桌上了。

speaker: B
sentence: Today we will learn new words.
zh: 今天我们学新词。

speaker: A
sentence: I have my notebook ready.
zh: 我准备好笔记本了。

speaker: B
sentence: Write down the words on the board.
zh: 把黑板上的词抄下来。

speaker: A
sentence: I am writing them now.
zh: 我正在写。

speaker: B
sentence: After that, do the exercise on page ten.
zh: 然后做第十页的练习。

speaker: A
sentence: I do not see the page clearly.
zh: 我看不清那一页。

speaker: B
sentence: It is the page with a picture of a tree.
zh: 就是有树的那一页。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, I see it now. Thank you.
zh: 哦，现在看到了。谢谢。

speaker: B
sentence: Do the first five questions.
zh: 做前五道题。

speaker: A
sentence: I am working on question three.
zh: 我正在做第三题。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Raise your hand if you need help.
zh: 好，需要帮助就举手。

speaker: A
sentence: I have a question about the homework.
zh: 我有个关于作业的问题。

speaker: B
sentence: What is your question?
zh: 什么问题？

speaker: A
sentence: I do not understand what to do for number six.
zh: 我不明白第六题要做什么。

speaker: B
sentence: For number six, write a short story using the new words.
zh: 第六题，用新词写一个短故事。

speaker: A
sentence: How many words must I use?
zh: 必须用几个词？

speaker: B
sentence: Use at least five of the new words.
zh: 至少用五个新词。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will do that.
zh: 谢谢。我会做的。

speaker: B
sentence: Finish the work before the bell.
zh: 在下课前完成。

speaker: A
sentence: I am almost done with the exercise.
zh: 我快做完练习了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then you may pack your bag.
zh: 好，那你可以收拾书包了。

speaker: A
sentence: I put my pencil and book in the bag.
zh: 我把铅笔和书放进包里。

speaker: B
sentence: The bell will ring soon.
zh: 快打铃了。

speaker: A
sentence: I am ready to go home now.
zh: 我现在准备回家了。

speaker: B
sentence: Have a good afternoon.
zh: 下午好。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you, teacher. Goodbye.
zh: 谢谢老师，再见。

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning. I need to get a number.
zh: 早上好。我需要取个号。

speaker: B
sentence: Good morning. Take a number from the machine.
zh: 早上好。从机器上取个号。

speaker: A
sentence: I have my number. It is 23.
zh: 我取到号了，是23号。

speaker: B
sentence: Please wait. I will call you when it is your turn.
zh: 请稍等。轮到您时我会叫您。

speaker: A
sentence: My number is called. I come to your window.
zh: 叫到我的号了。我到您的窗口来。

speaker: B
sentence: How can I help you today?
zh: 今天您需要办理什么业务？

speaker: A
sentence: I want to put my pay into my account.
zh: 我想把工资存进我的账户。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have your card and ID?
zh: 您有银行卡和身份证吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, here is my card and my ID card.
zh: 有，这是我的银行卡和身份证。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. How much money do you put in?
zh: 好的。您要存多少钱？

speaker: A
sentence: I have 5000 dollars in cash.
zh: 我有5000元现金。

speaker: B
sentence: Please give me the money. I will count it.
zh: 请把钱给我。我来点一下。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the money. It is all there.
zh: 给您钱。都在这里了。

speaker: B
sentence: The money is 5000 dollars. That is right.
zh: 钱是5000元，没错。

speaker: A
sentence: I also need to get a new card.
zh: 我还需要办一张新卡。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you want a new card for this account?
zh: 您想为这个账户办一张新卡吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, a new card for the same account.
zh: 是的，同一个账户的新卡。

speaker: B
sentence: Please fill out this form.
zh: 请填写这张表格。

speaker: A
sentence: I have filled it out. Here it is.
zh: 我填好了。给您。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see your ID again.
zh: 让我再看一下您的身份证。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is my ID.
zh: 这是我的身份证。

speaker: B
sentence: I will make the new card now. Please wait a minute.
zh: 我现在就制作新卡。请稍等一分钟。

speaker: A
sentence: I will wait here.
zh: 我在这儿等着。

speaker: B
sentence: Here is your new card. Please keep it safe.
zh: 这是您的新卡。请妥善保管。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will take good care of it.
zh: 谢谢。我会好好保管的。

speaker: B
sentence: Now let me give you your receipt.
zh: 现在给您回单。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. Can you tell me my balance?
zh: 谢谢。能告诉我余额是多少吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Your balance is 15000 dollars.
zh: 您的余额是15000元。

speaker: A
sentence: That is right. Thank you for your help.
zh: 没错。谢谢您的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a good day. Goodbye.
zh: 不客气。祝您愉快。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: What steps do we start with?
zh: 我们从哪一步开始？

speaker: B
sentence: You will. Just copy my feet.
zh: 你会的，照我的脚做就行。

speaker: A
sentence: Left foot forward, then right foot together?
zh: 左脚向前，然后右脚并拢？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, and then step back with left.
zh: 对，然后左脚后退。

speaker: A
sentence: Like this? One, two, three?
zh: 这样？一、二、三？

speaker: A
sentence: Side step? To the right?
zh: 侧步？向右？

speaker: A
sentence: Okay. One, two, three, four... better.
zh: 好，一、二、三、四……好多了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes! Now turn your body a little.
zh: 对！身体稍微转一下。

speaker: A
sentence: Turn? Like this?
zh: 转？这样？

speaker: B
sentence: A bit more. Keep your arms loose.
zh: 再多转一点，手臂放松。

speaker: B
sentence: Take a short rest. Drink some water.
zh: 休息一下，喝点水。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. I need a minute.
zh: 谢谢，我需要缓一下。

speaker: B
sentence: Here we go. One, two, three, four...
zh: 开始了，一、二、三、四……

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Let's put the steps together.
zh: 好。我们把步子连起来。

speaker: A
sentence: Forward, together, back, side... like this?
zh: 前进，并步，后退，侧步……这样吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, but keep your head up.
zh: 对，但头要抬起来。

speaker: A
sentence: One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight.
zh: 一、二、三、四、五、六、七、八。

speaker: A
sentence: Forward, together, back, side, turn, step.
zh: 前进，并步，后退，侧步，转身，迈步。

speaker: B
sentence: Better! Now we do it to music.
zh: 好多了！现在我们跟着音乐跳。

speaker: A
sentence: Ready.
zh: 准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Five, six, seven, eight!
zh: 五、六、七、走！

speaker: B
sentence: Good! Keep going!
zh: 很好！继续！

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, from the top. Ready?
zh: 好，从头开始。准备好了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Ready. One, two, three, four...
zh: 准备好了。一、二、三、四……

speaker: B
sentence: Good, keep the rhythm. Five, six, seven, eight!
zh: 好，保持节奏。五、六、七、八！

speaker: A
sentence: Like this? Left arm up, right arm out?
zh: 这样吗？左臂上举，右臂伸出？

speaker: A
sentence: Music starts... One, two, three, four...
zh: 音乐开始……一、二、三、四……

speaker: B
sentence: Good! Keep your arms loose.
zh: 好！手臂放松。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes! Now step back left.
zh: 对！现在左脚后退。

speaker: A
sentence: Left back, right together, side step...
zh: 左脚后退，右脚并拢，侧步……

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. And smile!
zh: 对。还要微笑！

speaker: A
sentence: One, two, three, four... arm up, out.
zh: 一、二、三、四……手臂上举、伸出。

speaker: B
sentence: Great! Now from the top with music.
zh: 很好！现在从头配合音乐。

speaker: B
sentence: You will do great. Rest now.
zh: 你会跳得很棒的。现在休息吧。

speaker: B
sentence: And take a walk through the woods after that.
zh: 然后去树林里散散步。

speaker: B
sentence: Those flowers will be wet from the rain.
zh: 那些花会被雨打湿。

speaker: A
sentence: What do you have in mind? I am open to ideas.
zh: 你有什么想法？我愿意听听。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a different experience, but not bad.
zh: 那是不一样的感觉，但也不错。

speaker: A
sentence: Let us make the best of it.
zh: 我们好好利用这个机会吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I will wash them while you cut the meat.
zh: 我来洗，你切肉。

speaker: A
sentence: I am ready. Let us cook.
zh: 我准备好了。我们做饭吧。

speaker: A
sentence: This is a good adjustment.
zh: 这是个好的调整。

speaker: B
sentence: I am happy we made it work.
zh: 我很高兴我们成功了。

speaker: A
sentence: Me too. I was looking forward to it all week.
zh: 我也是。我期待了整整一周。

speaker: B
sentence: Then the rain came without warning.
zh: 结果雨毫无预兆地就来了。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. I will keep that day open too.
zh: 太好了。我也把那天空出来。

speaker: A
sentence: Like cooking together, which we are doing now.
zh: 比如一起做饭，就像现在这样。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me taste it. Needs a little more salt.
zh: 我尝尝。还需要再加点盐。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The meat is almost ready.
zh: 不错。肉快好了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will get the plates.
zh: 我去拿盘子。

speaker: B
sentence: It does. Even without the walk.
zh: 是啊。即使没有散步。

speaker: B
sentence: We made the best of it together.
zh: 我们一起尽力而为了。

speaker: B
sentence: The secret is slow cooking.
zh: 秘诀是慢炖。

speaker: A
sentence: And cook if it rains again.
zh: 如果又下雨就做饭。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Thank you for being here.
zh: 是的。谢谢你在这里。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. This is a good meal.
zh: 我会的。这顿饭很好。

speaker: B
sentence: And a good day after all.
zh: 毕竟还是美好的一天。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Let us clean up together.
zh: 是的。我们一起收拾吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I will dry them.
zh: 我来擦干。

speaker: B
sentence: We did well today.
zh: 我们今天做得不错。

speaker: B
sentence: Me too. It was a good change.
zh: 我也是。这是个好的改变。

speaker: A
sentence: The meat is ready now.
zh: 肉现在好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Me too. Let us start.
zh: 我也是。我们开始吧。

speaker: A
sentence: This is a good end to the day.
zh: 这是个美好的收尾。

speaker: A
sentence: It is Tuesday night. I have a meeting tomorrow.
zh: 现在是周二晚上。我明天有个会。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, you need that record for your talk.
zh: 对，你开会要用那份资料。

speaker: A
sentence: Where is the link? I will get it now.
zh: 链接在哪里？我现在就下载。

speaker: B
sentence: Here it is. Click this blue word.
zh: 在这儿。点这个蓝色的字。

speaker: A
sentence: I see it. I am clicking now.
zh: 看到了。我现在点一下。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The download has started.
zh: 好的。下载开始了。

speaker: A
sentence: How long will it take? I am worried.
zh: 要多久？我有点担心。

speaker: B
sentence: It is a big record. Maybe five minutes.
zh: 文件比较大，大概五分钟。

speaker: A
sentence: Five minutes is long. The network is slow.
zh: 五分钟有点久。网速慢。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is a little slow tonight.
zh: 是的，今晚有点慢。

speaker: A
sentence: The bar is moving. 20 percent now.
zh: 进度条在动。现在百分之二十了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. It will go faster after half.
zh: 那就好。过了一半会快一点。

speaker: A
sentence: I hope so. I need it for my meeting.
zh: 希望如此。我开会要用。

speaker: B
sentence: What is the meeting about?
zh: 会议是关于什么的？

speaker: A
sentence: A new project. I have to give a talk.
zh: 一个新项目。我要做个汇报。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. This record has the numbers.
zh: 明白了。这份资料里有数据。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. 40 percent now. Almost half.
zh: 对。现在百分之四十了。快一半了。

speaker: B
sentence: Keep watching. It will be done soon.
zh: 继续看着。很快就好了。

speaker: A
sentence: 60 percent. The network is better now.
zh: 百分之六十了。网速好一点了。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. You will have it in time.
zh: 太好了。你来得及的。

speaker: A
sentence: 80 percent. Almost there.
zh: 百分之八十了。快好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, just a little more.
zh: 是的，再等一下。

speaker: A
sentence: 100 percent! It is done.
zh: 百分之百！下载完了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now open it and see.
zh: 好。现在打开看看。

speaker: A
sentence: I am opening it now.
zh: 我现在打开。

speaker: B
sentence: Is it working?
zh: 能打开吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is open. All the pages are here.
zh: 能打开。所有页面都在。

speaker: B
sentence: Great. You have what you need.
zh: 太好了。你要的东西都有了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help. I am ready now.
zh: 谢谢你的帮助。我现在准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Good luck tomorrow.
zh: 不客气。明天祝你好运。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. Goodbye.
zh: 谢谢。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: I open my machine and see a new letter.
zh: 我打开电脑，看到一封新邮件。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I sent it at eight this morning. It is very important.
zh: 是的，我今天早上八点发的。这封信很紧急。

speaker: A
sentence: I will read it now. Give me a minute.
zh: 我现在就读。稍等一下。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. But I need an answer before twelve.
zh: 慢慢来。但我需要在十二点前得到回复。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the problem. You need the numbers for the new work.
zh: 我看到问题了。你需要新工作的数据。

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. The boss is waiting for them.
zh: 没错。老板在等这些数据。

speaker: A
sentence: I have the numbers on my machine. I will put them in a note.
zh: 我电脑里有这些数据。我会把它们写进邮件里。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Please send it to me as a record.
zh: 好的。请把邮件发给我。

speaker: A
sentence: I am writing the note now. I will say the numbers are ready.
zh: 我正在写邮件。我会说数据已经准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Make sure to say when you will send the full paper.
zh: 请说明你什么时候会发完整的文件。

speaker: A
sentence: I will say I will send it by two this afternoon.
zh: 我会说今天下午两点前发过去。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. The boss will be happy.
zh: 很好。老板会满意的。

speaker: A
sentence: I am checking the words. Is the number 150 right?
zh: 我在检查文字。数字150对吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, 150 is right. But please use 150, not one hundred fifty.
zh: 对，150是正确的。但请用数字150，不要写一百五十。

speaker: A
sentence: I will change it to 150. I am almost done.
zh: 我会改成150。我快写完了。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not send it yet. I need you to add one more thing.
zh: 先别发。我需要你再加一件事。

speaker: A
sentence: What is it? I will put it in the note.
zh: 什么事？我会加进去。

speaker: B
sentence: Say that the meeting is at three, not four.
zh: 说会议在三点，不是四点。

speaker: A
sentence: I will add that now. The meeting time is changed.
zh: 我现在就加。会议时间改了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. And say we will talk about the numbers then.
zh: 对。并且说我们到时候会讨论这些数据。

speaker: A
sentence: I have put it in. Now I am reading the note again.
zh: 我已经加进去了。现在我在重新读一遍邮件。

speaker: B
sentence: Is everything clear? No errors?
zh: 都清楚吗？没有错误？

speaker: A
sentence: It looks good. The numbers are right and the time is right.
zh: 看起来没问题。数据正确，时间也正确。

speaker: B
sentence: Then you are ready to send it.
zh: 那你可以发了。

speaker: A
sentence: I am sending it now. One moment.
zh: 我现在就发。稍等。

speaker: B
sentence: Did it go through? I see it on my machine.
zh: 发出去了吗？我在电脑上看到了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is sent. You have the note now.
zh: 是的，发出去了。你现在收到邮件了。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. That was quick. Goodbye.
zh: 谢谢。真快。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: My friend fell down. He is hurt.
zh: 我朋友摔倒了。他受伤了。

speaker: B
sentence: Where are you? I will get help.
zh: 你在哪里？我去叫人来帮忙。

speaker: A
sentence: We are on the street near the red building.
zh: 我们在红房子旁边的街上。

speaker: B
sentence: Is your friend awake? Can he talk?
zh: 你朋友醒着吗？他能说话吗？

speaker: A
sentence: His eyes are shut. He is not moving.
zh: 他眼睛闭着，一动不动。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not move him. Keep him warm.
zh: 别动他。给他保暖。

speaker: A
sentence: I put my coat over him. What now?
zh: 我把外套盖在他身上了。现在怎么办？

speaker: B
sentence: Stay on the line. I am sending a machine.
zh: 别挂电话。我叫了救护车。

speaker: A
sentence: How long will it take? It is dark here.
zh: 要多久？这里很暗。

speaker: B
sentence: Five minutes. Look for lights and sound.
zh: 五分钟。注意看灯光和声音。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a light far away. Is that them?
zh: 我看到远处有灯光。是他们吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is the help machine. Wave your hand.
zh: 是的，那是救护车。挥挥手。

speaker: A
sentence: I am waving now. They are coming closer.
zh: 我在挥手。他们越来越近了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Tell them what happened.
zh: 好的。告诉他们发生了什么。

speaker: A
sentence: They are here. Two men with a bed.
zh: 他们到了。两个人抬着担架。

speaker: B
sentence: Let them do their work. Stay back.
zh: 让他们工作。你退后。

speaker: A
sentence: They are putting him on the bed carefully.
zh: 他们小心地把他抬上担架。

speaker: B
sentence: Is he breathing? Look at his chest.
zh: 他在呼吸吗？看他的胸口。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, his chest goes up and down slowly.
zh: 是的，他的胸口在慢慢起伏。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good sign. He will be all right.
zh: 这是好兆头。他会没事的。

speaker: A
sentence: They are putting him in the machine now.
zh: 他们现在把他抬上车了。

speaker: B
sentence: You go with them. I will tell the hospital.
zh: 你跟他们去。我会通知医院。

speaker: A
sentence: One man says I can come. I am getting in.
zh: 一个人说我可以上车。我上去了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Give them his name if you know it.
zh: 好的。如果你知道他名字就告诉他们。

speaker: A
sentence: His name is my friend. They are writing it.
zh: 他的名字是我朋友。他们在记。

speaker: B
sentence: The machine is moving now. You are safe.
zh: 车在开了。你们安全了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, we are on the way. Thank you for your help.
zh: 是的，我们在路上了。谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: You did well. Take care of your friend. Goodbye.
zh: 你做得很好。照顾好你朋友。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: Today at work, I had a hard time.
zh: 今天上班，我遇到了不顺心的事。

speaker: B
sentence: I am sorry to hear that. What happened?
zh: 听到这个我很难过。发生什么了？

speaker: A
sentence: My boss said my work was not good enough.
zh: 老板说我的工作做得不够好。

speaker: B
sentence: That is hard. Do you think it is true?
zh: 那真难受。你觉得他说得对吗？

speaker: A
sentence: I am not sure. I did my best.
zh: 我不确定。我已经尽力了。

speaker: B
sentence: Sometimes bosses are not kind. You are a good worker.
zh: 有时候老板不友善。你是个好员工。

speaker: A
sentence: But he said I made a big error in the report.
zh: 但他说我在报告里犯了大错。

speaker: B
sentence: Was the error very bad? Can you fix it?
zh: 错误很严重吗？能改吗？

speaker: A
sentence: I fixed it already, but he was still angry.
zh: 我已经改了，但他还是很生气。

speaker: B
sentence: That is not fair. You did what you could.
zh: 那不公平。你已经做了你能做的。

speaker: A
sentence: I feel very sad and tired now.
zh: 我现在又难过又累。

speaker: B
sentence: It is normal to feel that way. Let us walk a bit more.
zh: 有这种感觉很正常。我们再走一会儿吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for listening. It helps.
zh: 谢谢你听我说。这让我好受些。

speaker: B
sentence: That is what friends are for. You are not alone.
zh: 朋友就是这样的。你不是一个人。

speaker: A
sentence: I was worried I would be fired.
zh: 我担心会被开除。

speaker: B
sentence: Did he say anything about that?
zh: 他提到这个了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, he did not. But I am still afraid.
zh: 没有，但我还是害怕。

speaker: B
sentence: One mistake does not mean you will lose your job.
zh: 一个错误不代表你会丢工作。

speaker: A
sentence: Maybe you are right. I need to be strong.
zh: 也许你说得对。我要坚强起来。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Tomorrow is a new day. You can do better.
zh: 是的。明天是新的一天。你可以做得更好。

speaker: A
sentence: I will try to talk to my boss again.
zh: 我会试着再和老板谈谈。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. Clear communication is important.
zh: 好主意。清晰的沟通很重要。

speaker: A
sentence: I feel a little better now. Thank you.
zh: 我现在感觉好一点了。谢谢你。

speaker: B
sentence: I am happy to help. Let us go back now.
zh: 很高兴能帮到你。我们回去吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is getting late. I need to rest.
zh: 好，天晚了。我需要休息。

speaker: B
sentence: You will feel better after sleep.
zh: 睡一觉你会感觉好多了。

speaker: A
sentence: I hope so. Thank you for everything.
zh: 希望如此。谢谢你做的一切。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. See you tomorrow.
zh: 不客气。明天见。

speaker: A
sentence: Are you ready? Let's start the level.
zh: 准备好了吗？我们开始这一关吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I am ready. Go now.
zh: 好了，开始吧。

speaker: A
sentence: The enemy is on the left side.
zh: 左边有敌人。

speaker: B
sentence: I see him. I will take him out.
zh: 看到了，我来解决他。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will go to the right door.
zh: 好，我去右边的门。

speaker: B
sentence: Wait for me. There may be a trap.
zh: 等等我，可能有陷阱。

speaker: A
sentence: You are right. I see a wire on the floor.
zh: 你说得对，地上有根线。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not step on it. I will cut it.
zh: 别踩，我来剪断它。

speaker: A
sentence: It is done. Now we can go through.
zh: 好了，我们可以过去了。

speaker: B
sentence: There is a big monster in the next room.
zh: 下一个房间里有个大怪物。

speaker: A
sentence: I will make it angry. You attack from behind.
zh: 我来引它生气，你从后面攻击。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. I am ready.
zh: 好主意，我准备好了。

speaker: A
sentence: Here it comes! Now!
zh: 它来了！就现在！

speaker: B
sentence: I hit it! But it is still strong.
zh: 我打中了！但它还很厉害。

speaker: A
sentence: Use the fire spell. It is weak to fire.
zh: 用火魔法，它怕火。

speaker: B
sentence: I have no fire spell. Do you have one?
zh: 我没有火魔法，你有吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I will use it now.
zh: 有，我现在就用。

speaker: B
sentence: The monster is down! We did it!
zh: 怪物倒了！我们成功了！

speaker: A
sentence: But the door is still locked.
zh: 但门还是锁着的。

speaker: B
sentence: Look for a key in this room.
zh: 在这个房间里找钥匙。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a key under the table.
zh: 桌子下面有把钥匙。

speaker: B
sentence: Get it quickly. More enemies are coming.
zh: 快拿，更多敌人来了。

speaker: A
sentence: I have the key. Let's go to the door.
zh: 钥匙拿到了，我们去门口。

speaker: B
sentence: I will cover you. Open it now.
zh: 我掩护你，快开门。

speaker: A
sentence: The door is open! We are through!
zh: 门开了！我们通过了！

speaker: B
sentence: That was a hard level. Good work.
zh: 这一关真难，干得好。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, we worked well together.
zh: 是啊，我们配合得很好。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have time for another level?
zh: 还有时间再打一关吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, let's do the next one. See you there.
zh: 好，我们打下一关。回见。

speaker: A
sentence: My oil pointer is near the red line. I need oil before the journey.
zh: 我的油表快到红线了，出发前得加油。

speaker: B
sentence: You came at a good time. This station is not full of machines.
zh: 你来的是时候，这个加油站车不多。

speaker: A
sentence: I will go to the country. The sun goes down in three hours.
zh: 我要去外地，天黑前还有三个小时。

speaker: B
sentence: Which oil do you need? Regular or special?
zh: 加哪种油？普通还是好的？

speaker: A
sentence: Regular is good. Make it full, please.
zh: 普通的就行，加满吧。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put the pipe in now. It will take a short time.
zh: 我把油枪放进去，很快就好。

speaker: A
sentence: How much money will it be when it is full?
zh: 加满大概多少钱？

speaker: B
sentence: About three hundred. The price went up this week.
zh: 三百左右，这周涨价了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will give you three hundred now. Is that enough?
zh: 我先给你三百，够吗？

speaker: B
sentence: It may be a little more. I will give back the extra money.
zh: 可能会多一点，多了我退你。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the money. Please see if it is right.
zh: 钱给你，你点点。

speaker: B
sentence: It is right. The oil is almost full now.
zh: 正好。油快加满了。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will get a drink from the shop while it goes.
zh: 好，我去店里买瓶水。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. I will take the pipe out when it is done.
zh: 不急，满了我会拔枪。

speaker: A
sentence: I am back. Is the oil full now?
zh: 我回来了，加满了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is full. The number is three hundred and ten.
zh: 满了，一共三百一。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the ten more. Thank you for your help.
zh: 再给你十块，谢谢帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. I will put the cover back on.
zh: 不客气，我把油箱盖拧好。

speaker: A
sentence: I will make a quick look at the windows before I go.
zh: 我检查一下车窗再走。

speaker: B
sentence: The back window is a little dirty. Do you need a cloth?
zh: 后窗有点脏，要抹布吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, it is not a problem. I will go now.
zh: 不用了，没事。我这就出发。

speaker: B
sentence: Have a safe journey. The road is clear this time.
zh: 一路顺风，这会儿路况好。

speaker: A
sentence: I will be at my house before dark. Goodbye.
zh: 天黑前能到家。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: I see no bread in the house.
zh: 我看到家里没有面包了。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have a list of things to get?
zh: 你有要买的东西的清单吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I wrote it down. Bread and milk.
zh: 有，我写下来了。面包和牛奶。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The store is near your house.
zh: 好的。商店就在你家附近。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take my bag and go now.
zh: 我拿上袋子就出发。

speaker: B
sentence: What time is it now?
zh: 现在几点了？

speaker: A
sentence: It is six in the evening.
zh: 傍晚六点。

speaker: B
sentence: The store is open until nine.
zh: 商店营业到九点。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the bread on the shelf.
zh: 我看到架子上的面包了。

speaker: B
sentence: Take the one with no sugar.
zh: 拿那个没有糖的。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take this loaf. How much is it?
zh: 我拿这个面包。多少钱？

speaker: B
sentence: It is three dollars.
zh: 三美元。

speaker: A
sentence: And the milk is over there.
zh: 牛奶在那边。

speaker: B
sentence: Get the small bottle for one day.
zh: 拿小瓶的，够一天喝。

speaker: A
sentence: I have the bread and milk in my hand.
zh: 我手里拿着面包和牛奶。

speaker: B
sentence: Now go to the front to give money.
zh: 现在去前面付钱。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is five dollars.
zh: 这是五美元。

speaker: B
sentence: Your change is two dollars.
zh: 找您两美元。

speaker: A
sentence: I put the things in my bag.
zh: 我把东西放进袋子里。

speaker: B
sentence: Is there anything else you need?
zh: 还需要别的吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, that is all for now.
zh: 不用了，就这些。

speaker: B
sentence: Then you are ready to go back.
zh: 那你可以回去了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will go to my house now.
zh: 我现在回家。

speaker: B
sentence: Put the milk in the cold box.
zh: 把牛奶放进冰箱。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, and the bread on the table.
zh: 好的，面包放桌上。

speaker: B
sentence: Then you can make your meal.
zh: 然后你就可以做饭了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will make sandwiches for dinner.
zh: 我晚饭做三明治。

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds good.
zh: 听起来不错。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help.
zh: 谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Goodbye.
zh: 不客气。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning. I have a booking for a haircut at ten.
zh: 早上好。我预约了十点剪头发。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, your name is on my list. Please take a seat here.
zh: 是的，名单上有您的名字。请坐这里。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I have a important event next week, so I need a clean look.
zh: 谢谢。我下周有个重要场合，所以需要利落的发型。

speaker: B
sentence: I will do my best. How short do you need it?
zh: 我会尽力。您想剪多短？

speaker: A
sentence: Please take off about two inches from the back and sides.
zh: 后面和两边剪掉大约两英寸。

speaker: B
sentence: Like this? I will use my fingers to measure the length.
zh: 这样吗？我用手指量一下长度。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is good. Also make the top a little shorter, but not too much.
zh: 是的，很好。头顶也剪短一点，但不要太多。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. I will cut the top to about one inch, and keep the shape.
zh: 明白了。头顶剪到大约一英寸，保持形状。

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds right. My event is a business meeting.
zh: 听起来不错。我的活动是商务会议。

speaker: B
sentence: A business meeting needs a neat style. I will make it sharp.
zh: 商务会议需要整洁的发型。我会剪得利落。

speaker: A
sentence: Please also thin the hair a little, because it is thick.
zh: 请再打薄一点，因为头发很厚。

speaker: B
sentence: Of course. I will use thinning shears to make it lighter.
zh: 当然。我用打薄剪让头发更轻盈。

speaker: A
sentence: Do you need to wash my hair first?
zh: 需要先洗头吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I will wash it now. Please lean back over the basin.
zh: 是的，现在洗。请往后靠在盆上。

speaker: A
sentence: The water is a good temperature. Thank you.
zh: 水温正好。谢谢。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put in some shampoo and make a good foam.
zh: 我放些洗发水，打出泡沫。

speaker: A
sentence: That feels nice. My head is being rubbed well.
zh: 很舒服。按摩得很好。

speaker: B
sentence: Now I will wash off the soap. Then I will dry it with a cloth.
zh: 现在冲掉泡沫，然后用毛巾擦干。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. After that, please cut it as we said.
zh: 好的。之后请按我们说好的剪。

speaker: B
sentence: I will do that. Please look in the mirror while I work.
zh: 我会的。请看着镜子。

speaker: A
sentence: I am watching. The back looks even so far.
zh: 我看着。后面目前很均匀。

speaker: B
sentence: I will now cut the top. Please keep your head still.
zh: 现在剪头顶。请保持头不动。

speaker: A
sentence: Okay. I need it to be ready for next Saturday.
zh: 好的。下周六前要准备好。

speaker: B
sentence: It will be ready today. After cutting, I will blow-dry it.
zh: 今天就能好。剪完后我吹干。

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I will see the full effect then.
zh: 很好。到时候看整体效果。

speaker: B
sentence: Now it is done. Please look in the mirror and say if you like it.
zh: 剪好了。请照镜子看看是否满意。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is very good. The shape is clean and professional.
zh: 是的，非常好。造型干净利落，很专业。

speaker: B
sentence: I am glad. The money for the cut is thirty dollars.
zh: 很高兴您满意。剪发费用是三十美元。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the money. Thank you for your good work.
zh: 给你钱。谢谢你的好手艺。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a good time at your meeting. Goodbye.
zh: 不客气。祝您会议顺利。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: I have good news.
zh: 我有好消息。

speaker: B
sentence: What is it?
zh: 什么消息？

speaker: A
sentence: My idea was taken by the committee.
zh: 我的想法被委员会采纳了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is great! How did you do it?
zh: 太棒了！你是怎么做到的？

speaker: A
sentence: I worked on it for two months.
zh: 我准备了两个月。

speaker: B
sentence: A long time. Was it hard?
zh: 时间真长。难吗？

speaker: A
sentence: A little, but I was ready.
zh: 有一点，但我准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: What did you do?
zh: 你做了什么？

speaker: A
sentence: I gave a talk to the committee.
zh: 我向委员会做了汇报。

speaker: B
sentence: Was it hard?
zh: 难吗？

speaker: A
sentence: It was, but I had good answers.
zh: 是的，但我回答得很好。

speaker: B
sentence: What did they say?
zh: 他们怎么说？

speaker: A
sentence: They said my idea was new.
zh: 他们说我的想法很新颖。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. How many pages?
zh: 那很好。多少页？

speaker: A
sentence: Twenty pages.
zh: 二十页。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a long time.
zh: 那时间真长。

speaker: A
sentence: But I answered all questions.
zh: 但我回答了所有问题。

speaker: B
sentence: You did well.
zh: 你做得很好。

speaker: A
sentence: I am so happy.
zh: 我太开心了。

speaker: B
sentence: I am happy for you.
zh: 我为你高兴。

speaker: A
sentence: Let's go out to have a drink.
zh: 我们出去喝一杯吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. What time?
zh: 好主意。几点？

speaker: A
sentence: How about five thirty?
zh: 五点半怎么样？

speaker: B
sentence: Same place as last time?
zh: 和上次一样的地方？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the food there is good.
zh: 是的，那里的食物不错。

speaker: B
sentence: I will get the drinks.
zh: 我来买饮料。

speaker: A
sentence: No, it is my turn.
zh: 不，这次该我。

speaker: B
sentence: You are too kind.
zh: 你太好了。

speaker: A
sentence: This is a great day.
zh: 今天真是个好日子。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is.
zh: 是的，没错。

speaker: A
sentence: See you at five thirty.
zh: 五点半见。

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning, doctor. I am not well.
zh: 早上好，医生。我不舒服。

speaker: B
sentence: Please have a seat. What is the trouble?
zh: 请坐。哪里不舒服？

speaker: A
sentence: My throat is very sore and I cough a lot.
zh: 我喉咙很痛，还咳得厉害。

speaker: B
sentence: How long has this been going on?
zh: 这种情况持续多久了？

speaker: A
sentence: It started two days ago, but got worse last night.
zh: 两天前开始的，但昨晚加重了。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have a fever? Let me take your temperature.
zh: 发烧吗？我来量一下体温。

speaker: A
sentence: I felt hot last night, but I did not measure it.
zh: 昨晚感觉发热，但没量体温。

speaker: B
sentence: Your temperature is 38.2. That is a mild fever.
zh: 体温38.2度，是低烧。

speaker: A
sentence: My head also hurts, and my body feels weak.
zh: 头也痛，浑身没力气。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me look at your throat. Open your mouth wide.
zh: 让我看看喉咙。张大嘴巴。

speaker: A
sentence: Ah... Is it very red?
zh: 啊……是不是很红？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is swollen. You have a throat infection.
zh: 是的，肿了。是咽喉感染。

speaker: A
sentence: I have an important meeting tomorrow. Can I get better by then?
zh: 我明天有个重要会议。能好起来吗？

speaker: B
sentence: You need rest. The fever will go down in two days.
zh: 你需要休息。烧两天内会退。

speaker: A
sentence: What medicine should I take?
zh: 该吃什么药？

speaker: B
sentence: I will give you some pills for the fever and cough syrup.
zh: 我给你开退烧药和止咳糖浆。

speaker: A
sentence: How many times a day do I take them?
zh: 一天吃几次？

speaker: B
sentence: Three times a day after meals. Drink plenty of warm water.
zh: 一天三次，饭后服用。多喝温水。

speaker: A
sentence: Should I stay in bed?
zh: 需要卧床休息吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, rest in bed today and tomorrow. No work.
zh: 是的，今天和明天卧床休息。别工作。

speaker: A
sentence: I am worried about the meeting. Can I go if I feel better?
zh: 我担心会议。如果感觉好点能去吗？

speaker: B
sentence: It is better not to go. You might give it to others.
zh: 最好不要去。可能会传染给别人。

speaker: A
sentence: You are right. I will cancel it.
zh: 你说得对。我取消会议。

speaker: B
sentence: Here is the prescription. Take it to the pharmacy.
zh: 这是处方。去药房拿药。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you, doctor. I will follow your advice.
zh: 谢谢你，医生。我会照你说的做。

speaker: B
sentence: Get plenty of sleep and drink water. You will be well soon.
zh: 多睡觉，多喝水。很快就会好。

speaker: A
sentence: I will go home and rest now.
zh: 我现在回家休息。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Take care of yourself. Goodbye.
zh: 好的。保重身体。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: I am turning on the machine now.
zh: 我现在打开电脑。

speaker: B
sentence: Is the network working?
zh: 网络能用吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is. I see the network sign.
zh: 可以，我看到网络图标了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Open the browser to start.
zh: 好。打开浏览器开始吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I am opening it now. What word do I put in?
zh: 我正在打开。要输入什么关键词？

speaker: B
sentence: Put in 'school report' and the year.
zh: 输入‘学校报告’和年份。

speaker: A
sentence: I put that in. Now I see a list of pages.
zh: 我输入了。现在看到一列页面。

speaker: B
sentence: Which one has the facts we need?
zh: 哪个有我们需要的资料？

speaker: A
sentence: The first one seems good. I am opening it.
zh: 第一个看起来不错。我打开它。

speaker: B
sentence: What does it say at the top?
zh: 最上面写了什么？

speaker: A
sentence: It says 'History of the town' in big letters.
zh: 大字写着‘小镇的历史’。

speaker: B
sentence: That is what we need. Read the first part.
zh: 那就是我们要的。读一下第一部分。

speaker: A
sentence: It says the town was started in 1800.
zh: 上面说小镇建于1800年。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Is there more about the first houses?
zh: 好。有更多关于第一批房屋的信息吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the next part is about the houses.
zh: 有，下一部分就是关于房屋的。

speaker: B
sentence: Write down the key points for the report.
zh: 把要点记下来，写进报告。

speaker: A
sentence: I am writing them now. The date and the number of houses.
zh: 我正在记。日期和房屋数量。

speaker: B
sentence: That is enough. We have the main facts now.
zh: 够了。我们现在有了主要信息。

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep this page open for later.
zh: 我把这个页面留着，一会儿用。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, do that. Then we can go back to it.
zh: 好，留着。这样我们还能再看。

speaker: A
sentence: I am making a note of the page name.
zh: 我把页面名字记下来。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. Now we have all we need.
zh: 好主意。现在我们需要的都有了。

speaker: A
sentence: I am closing the other pages to keep it clean.
zh: 我把其他页面关掉，保持整洁。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Then we can start writing the report.
zh: 好。然后我们就可以开始写报告了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help with the search.
zh: 谢谢你帮我查资料。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Now you have the facts.
zh: 不客气。现在你有资料了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will write the report tonight.
zh: 我今晚就把报告写完。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I am happy to help. Goodbye.
zh: 好。很高兴能帮忙。再见。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. Please put them on the scale.
zh: 明白了。请把它们放在秤上。

speaker: A
sentence: Great. How much is that?
zh: 太好了。多少钱？

speaker: A
sentence: Good afternoon. I need to send this parcel before five.
zh: 下午好。我需要在五点前寄出这个包裹。

speaker: A
sentence: Do you have a receipt for me?
zh: 有回执给我吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. When will it be sent out?
zh: 谢谢。什么时候发出？

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you very much for your help.
zh: 非常感谢你的帮助。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you so much. Have a great day.
zh: 非常感谢。祝您愉快。

speaker: A
sentence: Oh no. I only have a 50. Do you have change?
zh: 哦不，我只有50块。能找开吗？

speaker: B
sentence: All good now. Do you need insurance?
zh: 现在好了。需要保险吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you very much. Have a good day.
zh: 非常感谢。祝您愉快。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see it. Is it clear?
zh: 让我看看。清楚吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. Also, I need it to go by air.
zh: 谢谢。还有，我要寄航空。

speaker: A
sentence: What goes in the box for value?
zh: 价值那栏填什么？

speaker: A
sentence: Done. Here you are.
zh: 签好了，给你。

speaker: A
sentence: Is it over the limit?
zh: 超重了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, we take cards.
zh: 可以，我们收卡。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. Here is your receipt.
zh: 付完了，这是收据。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. What time will it get there?
zh: 谢谢，什么时候能到？

speaker: B
sentence: In about three days by air.
zh: 航空大约三天。

speaker: A
sentence: Here you go. Is everything okay now?
zh: 给你。现在没问题了吧？

speaker: A
sentence: Card, please. Here it is.
zh: 刷卡。给你卡。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. Please sign here.
zh: 谢谢。请在这里签名。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, if you send it now. Here is your receipt.
zh: 可以，如果您现在寄出。这是您的收据。

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep this receipt safe.
zh: 我会把这张收据收好。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help today.
zh: 谢谢你今天的帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a good day.
zh: 不客气。祝您愉快。

speaker: A
sentence: You too.
zh: 您也是。

speaker: B
sentence: Goodbye.
zh: 再见。

speaker: A
sentence: Let us put the books into this box.
zh: 我们把书放进这个箱子里吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will get more paper from the other room.
zh: 好，我去另一个房间再拿些纸。

speaker: A
sentence: Be careful with the glass things. They are dear.
zh: 小心玻璃制品，它们很贵重。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put them in soft cloth first.
zh: 我会先用软布把它们包好。

speaker: A
sentence: This box is full. Let us take it to the machine.
zh: 这个箱子满了，我们把它搬到车上去吧。

speaker: B
sentence: It is heavy. I will take one side.
zh: 很重，我抬一边。

speaker: A
sentence: Lift with your legs, not your back.
zh: 用腿发力，别用腰。

speaker: B
sentence: I have it. Let us go down the stairs slowly.
zh: 我抬好了，我们慢慢下楼梯。

speaker: A
sentence: Put it in the back of the machine.
zh: 把它放在车后面。

speaker: B
sentence: I will push it against the wall so it does not move.
zh: 我把它靠墙推紧，这样就不会动了。

speaker: A
sentence: Now we need to get the bed frame.
zh: 现在我们要搬床架。

speaker: B
sentence: It is in the bedroom. Let us take it apart first.
zh: 它在卧室里，我们先拆开。

speaker: A
sentence: I have the screwdriver. You take the other end.
zh: 我拿着螺丝刀，你抬另一端。

speaker: B
sentence: The screws are out. Now we can take it outside.
zh: 螺丝取出来了，现在可以搬出去了。

speaker: A
sentence: Watch your step on the door edge.
zh: 小心门槛。

speaker: B
sentence: We will put it on top of the boxes.
zh: 我们把它放在箱子上面。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. That is the last big thing from the old house.
zh: 好，这是旧家最后一件大件了。

speaker: B
sentence: Let us go to the new house now.
zh: 我们现在去新家吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I will drive. You keep the boxes from falling.
zh: 我来开车，你扶着箱子别让它掉下来。

speaker: B
sentence: The road is smooth. We will be there in ten minutes.
zh: 路很平，十分钟就到。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is the new house. Let us take the boxes inside.
zh: 新家到了，我们把箱子搬进去。

speaker: B
sentence: Which room for the books?
zh: 书放哪个房间？

speaker: A
sentence: The small room on the left.
zh: 左边的小房间。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put this box there now.
zh: 我现在把这个箱子放过去。

speaker: A
sentence: The bed frame goes in the big bedroom.
zh: 床架放大卧室。

speaker: B
sentence: I will take one end again.
zh: 我再抬一头。

speaker: A
sentence: Put it against the wall under the window.
zh: 靠窗户的墙边放。

speaker: B
sentence: It is in place. Now we are done.
zh: 放好了，现在我们完工了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help today.
zh: 谢谢你今天的帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Everything is in the right rooms.
zh: 不客气，所有东西都放在该放的房间了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will make the house ready for Monday.
zh: 我会把房子收拾好，准备周一入住。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will go now. Goodbye.
zh: 好，我现在走了。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: My room is so dirty. I need to make it clean.
zh: 我的房间太脏了。我得打扫干净。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is a big mess. What will you do first?
zh: 是啊，真是一团糟。你打算先做什么？

speaker: A
sentence: I will start with the floor. I have a brush and a dustpan.
zh: 我先扫地。我有扫帚和簸箕。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will help you move the chair.
zh: 好的。我帮你挪椅子。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will sweep under the bed.
zh: 谢谢你。我来扫床底下。

speaker: B
sentence: There is a lot of dust there. Take your time.
zh: 那里灰尘很多。慢慢来。

speaker: A
sentence: Now I will put the books back on the shelf.
zh: 现在我把书放回书架。

speaker: B
sentence: These books are in a pile. Which order?
zh: 这些书堆成一堆。按什么顺序？

speaker: A
sentence: By size, from big to small.
zh: 按大小，从大到小。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. I will hand them to you.
zh: 好主意。我递给你。

speaker: A
sentence: This is a heavy book. It goes on the bottom.
zh: 这本很重。放最下面。

speaker: B
sentence: All the books are in place now. What is next?
zh: 所有书都放好了。接下来呢？

speaker: A
sentence: I will make the bed. The sheet is not straight.
zh: 我来铺床。床单不平。

speaker: B
sentence: I will take the other end. Pull it tight.
zh: 我拉另一头。拉紧。

speaker: A
sentence: Now the pillow is in the right place.
zh: 现在枕头放正了。

speaker: B
sentence: The room is starting to look clean.
zh: 房间开始看起来干净了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put the dirty clothes in the basket.
zh: 我把脏衣服放进篮子里。

speaker: B
sentence: That basket is full. Do you have another?
zh: 那个篮子满了。你还有别的吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, under the desk. I will use it.
zh: 有，在桌子下面。我用那个。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now the floor is clear.
zh: 好的。现在地板干净了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will wipe the desk with a cloth.
zh: 我用布擦桌子。

speaker: B
sentence: There are some marks. Rub them off.
zh: 有些印记。擦掉它们。

speaker: A
sentence: All done. The room is clean now.
zh: 都弄好了。房间现在干净了。

speaker: B
sentence: You did a great job. It looks new.
zh: 你干得很好。看起来像新的一样。

speaker: A
sentence: Let us sit down and rest for a minute.
zh: 我们坐下来休息一会儿吧。

speaker: B
sentence: I am happy to see it so tidy.
zh: 看到这么整洁我很高兴。

speaker: A
sentence: My friend will come this afternoon. It is ready.
zh: 我朋友下午要来。准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: He will be pleased. Goodbye.
zh: 他会高兴的。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: The sky is so blue today. No clouds at all.
zh: 今天的天好蓝，一朵云都没有。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, a good day for a walk. The trees are green.
zh: 是啊，适合散步。树都绿了。

speaker: A
sentence: I feel better already. Work has been hard this week.
zh: 我已经感觉好多了。这周工作很累。

speaker: B
sentence: That is why we are here. Let us go slowly.
zh: 所以我们才来这里。慢慢走吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Look at those flowers. They are red and yellow.
zh: 看那些花，有红的和黄的。

speaker: B
sentence: Very bright. The wind makes them move.
zh: 很鲜艳。风让它们动来动去。

speaker: A
sentence: I see a bird on that branch. It is singing.
zh: 我看到树枝上有只鸟，在唱歌。

speaker: B
sentence: It is a small brown bird. Happy in the sun.
zh: 是只棕色的小鸟，在太阳下很开心。

speaker: A
sentence: The air smells fresh. Like grass and earth.
zh: 空气很清新，有青草和泥土的味道。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. No city noise here. Only nature.
zh: 是的，没有城市的噪音，只有大自然。

speaker: A
sentence: I can hear the leaves in the wind. Very peaceful.
zh: 我能听到风吹树叶的声音，很平静。

speaker: B
sentence: This path goes around the lake. Let us follow it.
zh: 这条路绕着湖，我们沿着走吧。

speaker: A
sentence: The water is so clear. I see fish inside.
zh: 水好清，我看到里面有鱼。

speaker: B
sentence: They are small and silver. Swimming together.
zh: 它们小小的，银色的，一起游。

speaker: A
sentence: I almost forgot my problems. This helps a lot.
zh: 我几乎忘了我的烦恼，这很有帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: Nature is a good medicine. Take your time.
zh: 大自然是一剂良药，慢慢来。

speaker: A
sentence: Look at that big tree. Its branches are wide.
zh: 看那棵大树，树枝很宽。

speaker: B
sentence: It is very old. Many birds live there.
zh: 它很老了，很多鸟住在上面。

speaker: A
sentence: I want to sit here for a minute. On this seat.
zh: 我想在这里坐一会儿，在这张椅子上。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. Rest your legs and your mind.
zh: 好主意，让你的腿和大脑休息一下。

speaker: A
sentence: The sun is warm on my face. Not too hot.
zh: 阳光照在脸上很温暖，不太热。

speaker: B
sentence: A perfect afternoon. We have time.
zh: 完美的下午，我们有时间。

speaker: A
sentence: I hear children laughing far away. Happy sounds.
zh: 我听到远处孩子们的笑声，快乐的声音。

speaker: B
sentence: Life is simple here. No rush.
zh: 这里生活很简单，没有匆忙。

speaker: A
sentence: The flowers have a sweet smell. Like honey.
zh: 花有甜甜的香味，像蜂蜜。

speaker: B
sentence: Bees are going from one to another. Working.
zh: 蜜蜂在花间飞来飞去，工作着。

speaker: A
sentence: I am ready to go back now. Feeling much better.
zh: 我现在准备回去了，感觉好多了。

speaker: B
sentence: Me too. The walk did us good.
zh: 我也是，散步对我们有好处。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for coming with me. Today was beautiful.
zh: 谢谢你陪我来，今天很美。

speaker: B
sentence: Any time. Let us come again next week. Goodbye.
zh: 随时，我们下周再来。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: What about time? I am slow at answering questions.
zh: 时间呢？我答题速度慢。

speaker: B
sentence: Keep breathing like that for one minute. You are doing well.
zh: 保持这样呼吸一分钟，你做得很好。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for helping me this morning.
zh: 谢谢你今天早上帮我。

speaker: B
sentence: That is what friends are for. Now let us get your bag ready.
zh: 朋友就该这样。现在把包准备好。

speaker: A
sentence: I put one in the side pocket of my bag.
zh: 我放了一瓶在包侧袋里。

speaker: A
sentence: It is only ten minutes away. We have enough time.
zh: 只有十分钟路程，时间足够。

speaker: A
sentence: Door is locked. Let us go.
zh: 门锁好了，走吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the sun is out. A good sign.
zh: 是啊，出太阳了，好兆头。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now take a deep breath again.
zh: 好。现在再深呼吸一次。

speaker: A
sentence: But what if the questions are hard?
zh: 但要是题目很难呢？

speaker: A
sentence: That is a good idea. I will do that.
zh: 好主意。我会那样做。

speaker: A
sentence: I have water in my bag too.
zh: 我包里也带了水。

speaker: B
sentence: That is normal. Take one last deep breath with me.
zh: 这很正常。跟我做最后一次深呼吸。

speaker: B
sentence: You have your watch? Keep an eye on time.
zh: 你带手表了吗？注意时间。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will do my best.
zh: 谢谢。我会尽力的。

speaker: A
sentence: Okay. In... out...

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now you are ready.
zh: 很好。现在你准备好了。

speaker: B
sentence: A good start to the day.
zh: 今天有个好开始。

speaker: A
sentence: I hope so.
zh: 希望如此。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for coming with me.
zh: 谢谢你陪我来。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now let us go.
zh: 好。我们走吧。

speaker: B
sentence: You are almost there.
zh: 你马上就到了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will do my best.
zh: 我会尽全力的。

speaker: A
sentence: I am walking in now.
zh: 我现在进去了。

speaker: A
sentence: One last wave.
zh: 最后挥一下手。

speaker: B
sentence: I am waving back. Now go!
zh: 我也在挥手。快进去吧！

speaker: A
sentence: Okay. Here I go.
zh: 好。我去了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I put it on this morning.
zh: 戴了，今天早上戴上的。

speaker: B
sentence: That is what friends are for.
zh: 朋友就是做这个的。

speaker: A
sentence: I will do it.
zh: 我会做的。

speaker: B
sentence: Good.
zh: 好的。

speaker: A
sentence: I have it on a paper. The number is 6222 0200 1234 5678.

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks for your help.
zh: 谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: A
sentence: Done. I am in. I see my accounts. Which one has the money?
zh: 好了。我进来了。看到我的账户了。哪个账户里有钱？

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Keep your paper with the account number safe.
zh: 好。把写有账号的纸收好。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Thank you for your help. I will go to bed now.
zh: 嗯，谢谢你的帮助。我现在去睡觉了。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome.
zh: 不客气。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, and I see the payment went through.
zh: 是的，我看到转账成功了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will sign out. Thank you for your help.
zh: 我退出了。谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: Great.
zh: 很好。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the money is gone from my account.
zh: 我看到钱从账户里扣掉了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now put the account number from your paper.
zh: 好。现在输入你纸上的账号。

speaker: B
sentence: That is normal. Keep the receipt for your records.
zh: 正常。保留回单作为记录。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take a picture of it. Thanks for guiding me.
zh: 我拍张照。谢谢你指导我。

speaker: A
sentence: It is the same as on my paper.
zh: 和纸上写的一样。

speaker: B
sentence: Then send the payment.
zh: 那就发送转账。

speaker: A
sentence: It says 'processing'. Is that normal?
zh: 显示‘处理中’，正常吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Good. You are done.
zh: 好的，你完成了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it will take a minute.
zh: 是的，需要一分钟。

speaker: A
sentence: Now it says 'completed'.
zh: 现在显示‘已完成’。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take a picture of the receipt.
zh: 我拍个收据的照片。

speaker: B
sentence: Good idea. Keep it safe.
zh: 好主意。收好它。

speaker: A
sentence: I put the account number. But the amount is wrong. It is 3000, but I only have 2500.
zh: 我输入了账号，但金额不对。是3000，但我只有2500。

speaker: B
sentence: Then change the amount to 2500. Send that.
zh: 那把金额改成2500。发送吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I changed it to 2500. It says processing.
zh: 我改成2500了。显示处理中。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. It will go through.
zh: 好。会成功的。

speaker: A
sentence: Now it says completed. I will sign out.
zh: 现在显示已完成。我退出了。

speaker: A
sentence: My old shoes are broken. I need a new pair for my journey.
zh: 我的旧鞋坏了，旅行需要一双新的。

speaker: B
sentence: Look at this picture. The price is good.
zh: 看这张图片，价格不错。

speaker: A
sentence: But the color is not what I need. I want black.
zh: 但颜色不是我想要的，我要黑色。

speaker: B
sentence: Here is a black one. It is the same price.
zh: 这有一双黑色的，价格一样。

speaker: A
sentence: The size is right? I take a 42.
zh: 尺码对吗？我穿42的。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, 42 is in the list. It will be good.
zh: 有，42码在列表里，应该合适。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put it in my cart. Then I give money.
zh: 我把它加入购物车，然后付款。

speaker: B
sentence: First see the address. Is it your house?
zh: 先看看地址，是你家吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, that is right. No changes.
zh: 对，没错，不用改。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now you give the money.
zh: 好的，现在付款吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I have done it. The money is gone.
zh: 付好了，钱已经扣了。

speaker: B
sentence: The store will send it tomorrow.
zh: 店家明天发货。

speaker: A
sentence: How long will it take? My journey is in five days.
zh: 要多久到？我五天后要旅行。

speaker: B
sentence: It says three days. You will have it in time.
zh: 上面说三天，你来得及。

speaker: A
sentence: I hope so. I will keep watching the network.
zh: 希望如此，我会一直看物流。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see the number. It is 123456.
zh: 我看看单号，是123456。

speaker: A
sentence: Two days later. The news says it is here.
zh: 两天后，物流显示到了。

speaker: B
sentence: Go to the door. The man is waiting.
zh: 去门口，快递员在等。

speaker: A
sentence: I have the box. It is not damaged.
zh: 我拿到箱子了，没有损坏。

speaker: B
sentence: Open it and see the shoes.
zh: 打开看看鞋子。

speaker: A
sentence: They are black, size 42. Everything is right.
zh: 是黑色的，42码，都没问题。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now you are ready for the journey.
zh: 好，那你旅行准备好了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, thank you for your help.
zh: 是的，谢谢你的帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Goodbye.
zh: 不客气，再见。

speaker: A
sentence: It is Friday morning. I need to give a paper on the system.
zh: 周五早上，我要在系统上提交一份论文。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. What is your name on the account?
zh: 好的。你的账户名是什么？

speaker: A
sentence: My name is A. But I have a problem.
zh: 我叫甲。但我有个问题。

speaker: B
sentence: What is the trouble?
zh: 什么问题？

speaker: A
sentence: I have no memory of my secret word for the system.
zh: 我忘记系统的密码了。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. That is a common trouble. Let me help you.
zh: 明白了。这是常见问题。我来帮你。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I have a letter from you before.
zh: 谢谢。我之前收到过你的邮件。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes. I will send a note to your other machine.
zh: 是的。我会发一条通知到你的另一台设备。

speaker: A
sentence: What is in the note?
zh: 通知里有什么？

speaker: B
sentence: A number to make certain you are the owner.
zh: 一个验证码，用来确认你是账户主人。

speaker: A
sentence: I have the note now. The number is 4829.
zh: 我收到通知了。验证码是4829。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Give that number to me.
zh: 好的。把那个数字告诉我。

speaker: A
sentence: Here it is: 4829.

speaker: B
sentence: That is right. Now you are free to make a new secret word.
zh: 正确。现在你可以设置新密码了。

speaker: A
sentence: What is the rule for the new secret word?
zh: 新密码有什么要求？

speaker: B
sentence: It must have eight signs, with a number.
zh: 必须八位，包含一个数字。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Put that in the box on your machine.
zh: 好的。在电脑上的框里输入。

speaker: A
sentence: I have put it in. What now?
zh: 我输入了。然后呢？

speaker: B
sentence: Put it in again to make certain.
zh: 再输一次确认。

speaker: A
sentence: Done. It says it is good.
zh: 好了。显示成功。

speaker: B
sentence: Now use the new secret word to get into the system.
zh: 现在用新密码登录系统。

speaker: A
sentence: I am in. I see my account page.
zh: 我登录了。看到我的账户页面。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Give your paper now while you are in.
zh: 好。趁现在把论文交了。

speaker: A
sentence: I have given the paper. It is done.
zh: 我提交了论文。完成了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep this new secret word in my mind.
zh: 我会记住这个新密码。

speaker: B
sentence: That is wise. Goodbye.
zh: 很明智。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: I came to see the room. Is this the right place?
zh: 我来看看房间。是这里吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, come in. I am the owner.
zh: 是的，请进。我是房东。

speaker: A
sentence: The street is quiet. That is good.
zh: 这条街很安静，不错。

speaker: B
sentence: The room is on the second floor. Let me take you up.
zh: 房间在二楼，我带你上去。

speaker: A
sentence: The stairs are clean. How old is this building?
zh: 楼梯很干净。这栋楼多少年了？

speaker: B
sentence: Ten years. It is in good condition.
zh: 十年了，状况很好。

speaker: A
sentence: The room has a window to the south. I like the light.
zh: 房间朝南有窗户。我喜欢光线。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is bright all day. The bed and table are new.
zh: 是的，整天都很亮。床和桌子是新的。

speaker: A
sentence: What is the price for one month?
zh: 一个月多少钱？

speaker: B
sentence: Two thousand five hundred. That is with water and power.
zh: 两千五，包水电。

speaker: A
sentence: My money is limited. Can you make it two thousand?
zh: 我预算有限。能降到两千吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Two thousand two hundred is the lowest I can go.
zh: 两千二是我能接受的最低价格。

speaker: A
sentence: That is still a bit high. But the room is good.
zh: 还是有点高，不过房间不错。

speaker: B
sentence: It is a fair price for this area. You will not find cheaper.
zh: 这个地段价格很公道了，你找不到更便宜的。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take it. How long is the agreement?
zh: 我租了。租期多久？

speaker: B
sentence: At least six months. You can do six or twelve.
zh: 至少六个月。你可以租半年或一年。

speaker: A
sentence: I need to move out of my dorm next week. Can I start on Monday?
zh: 我下周要搬出宿舍。周一能入住吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, Monday is free. You can come anytime.
zh: 可以，周一是空的。你随时可以来。

speaker: A
sentence: Do I need to give money now for the first month?
zh: 需要现在付第一个月的钱吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, please give me the first month and one month as a safe deposit.
zh: 是的，请付一个月租金和一个月押金。

speaker: A
sentence: That is four thousand four hundred. Here is the money.
zh: 那就是四千四。给你钱。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me count. Yes, it is right. I will give you a paper.
zh: 我数一下。对的，我给你开张收据。

speaker: A
sentence: Please write my name and the dates on it.
zh: 请写上我的名字和日期。

speaker: B
sentence: I will do that. Here is your paper. Keep it safe.
zh: 好的。这是你的收据，请保管好。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will come on Monday morning.
zh: 谢谢。我周一早上过来。

speaker: B
sentence: I will be here. I will give you the keys then.
zh: 我会在。到时候给你钥匙。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I am happy with this room.
zh: 好的。我对这个房间很满意。

speaker: B
sentence: I am glad. See you on Monday.
zh: 很高兴。周一见。

speaker: A
sentence: Good evening, I have a table for two at seven thirty.
zh: 晚上好，我订了七点半的两人桌。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, by the window. Here is the paper list.
zh: 是的，靠窗的位置。这是菜单。

speaker: A
sentence: That sounds right. My friend will be here any minute.
zh: 没错，我朋友马上就到。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. Would you like some water first?
zh: 不着急，先来点水吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, please. That would be great.
zh: 好的，麻烦了。

speaker: B
sentence: I will come back when you are ready.
zh: 你们准备好了我就过来。

speaker: A
sentence: My friend is here. Let's look at the paper.
zh: 我朋友到了，我们看看菜单吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Any drinks? We have tea and soft drinks.
zh: 喝点什么？有茶和饮料。

speaker: A
sentence: Two bottles of water, please.
zh: 两瓶水，谢谢。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it came this morning.
zh: 新鲜的，今天早上到的。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Please make it light in taste.
zh: 好的，请做得清淡点。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put the order in now.
zh: 我现在去下单。

speaker: A
sentence: How long will it take?
zh: 大概要多久？

speaker: B
sentence: The food will be ready in about 15 minutes.
zh: 菜大概十五分钟就好。

speaker: A
sentence: Great. Please put them in the middle.
zh: 太好了，请放中间。

speaker: B
sentence: The soup will be out in a minute.
zh: 汤马上就来。

speaker: A
sentence: My friend, I hope you like the food here.
zh: 朋友，希望你喜欢这里的菜。

speaker: B
sentence: How is everything?
zh: 菜怎么样？

speaker: A
sentence: The fish is good, but the price is a bit high.
zh: 鱼不错，但价格有点高。

speaker: B
sentence: Would you like to see the list again?
zh: 您要再看看菜单吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, thanks. I see. The food was good, but my friend and I only had two drinks.
zh: 不用了，谢谢。菜很好吃，但我和朋友只喝了两瓶水。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the water is free. The price is for the food only.
zh: 是的，水是免费的，价格只是菜钱。

speaker: A
sentence: How much is it?
zh: 多少钱？

speaker: B
sentence: Here is your receipt.
zh: 这是您的发票。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, please. Keep the change.
zh: 要的，零钱不用找了。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. Do you need a receipt?
zh: 谢谢，需要发票吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, please.
zh: 要的。

speaker: B
sentence: Have a good night.
zh: 祝您晚上愉快。

speaker: A
sentence: Hello.
zh: 喂。

speaker: B
sentence: A, is that you? Your voice sounds sad.
zh: 甲，是你吗？你的声音听起来很难过。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I am very sad today.
zh: 是的，我今天很难过。

speaker: B
sentence: What is the matter? Tell me.
zh: 发生什么事了？告诉我。

speaker: A
sentence: My little dog is sick. It is not moving.
zh: 我的小狗生病了。它不动了。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh, I am sorry to hear that. When did it get sick?
zh: 哦，听到这个我很难过。它什么时候生病的？

speaker: A
sentence: This morning, it would not eat or drink.
zh: 今天早上，它不吃也不喝。

speaker: B
sentence: Did you take it to a man who helps animals?
zh: 你带它去看兽医了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I went to the animal hospital this afternoon.
zh: 去了，我今天下午带它去了动物医院。

speaker: B
sentence: What did the doctor say?
zh: 医生怎么说？

speaker: A
sentence: He said it has a fever and needs medicine.
zh: 他说它发烧了，需要吃药。

speaker: B
sentence: That is not too bad. Did you get the medicine?
zh: 那还不算太糟。你拿到药了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I gave it some, but it is still very weak.
zh: 拿到了，我给它喂了一些，但它还是很虚弱。

speaker: B
sentence: It will take time. You are a good owner.
zh: 需要时间。你是个好主人。

speaker: A
sentence: I am so worried. It is like my best friend.
zh: 我很担心。它就像我最好的朋友。

speaker: B
sentence: I know. But you are doing everything right.
zh: 我知道。但你做得都对。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for listening. I feel a little better.
zh: 谢谢你听我说。我感觉好一点了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Keep giving the medicine and love.
zh: 那就好。继续给它喂药和关爱。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. It is sleeping now on my bed.
zh: 我会的。它现在在我床上睡觉。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good sign. Rest is important.
zh: 这是个好迹象。休息很重要。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I hope it will be better tomorrow.
zh: 是的，我希望它明天会好起来。

speaker: B
sentence: I am sure it will. You are taking good care.
zh: 我相信会的。你照顾得很好。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for calling. I was so alone.
zh: 谢谢你打电话来。我刚才好孤单。

speaker: B
sentence: That is what friends are for. Do you need anything?
zh: 朋友就是这样的。你需要什么吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, I am okay now. Talking helped.
zh: 不用了，我现在没事了。聊天有帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will call again tomorrow to see how you are.
zh: 好。我明天再打电话来看看你们的情况。

speaker: A
sentence: That would be nice. Thank you, friend.
zh: 那太好了。谢谢你，朋友。

speaker: B
sentence: Take care of yourself and the dog. Goodbye.
zh: 照顾好自己和狗狗。再见。

speaker: B
sentence: What word is giving you trouble? Let's look it up together.
zh: 哪个词让你犯难了？我们一起查查。

speaker: A
sentence: Good idea. Now I see a page about market prices.
zh: 好主意。现在我看到了一个关于市场价格的页面。

speaker: B
sentence: What is the word used for? In a book or a talk?
zh: 这个词用在什么地方？书里还是谈话里？

speaker: A
sentence: Okay, I did that. Now I see a list of pages.
zh: 好的，我加了。现在看到一列页面。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Thanks again.
zh: 我会的。再次感谢。

speaker: A
sentence: This page says the word is a kind of agreement.
zh: 这个页面说这个词是一种协议。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I have it in my notes now.
zh: 是的，我现在记在笔记里了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Thanks for your help.
zh: 我会的。谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, thanks for your help this afternoon.
zh: 是的，谢谢你今天下午帮忙。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I have it now. Thanks for your help.
zh: 好的，我记住了。多谢你帮忙。

speaker: A
sentence: I did. Now there are many pages, but which one is right?
zh: 我输了。现在出来很多页面，但哪个是对的？

speaker: A
sentence: I see the word in the news. It says 'price agreement' between two companies.
zh: 我在新闻里看到那个词了。说是两家公司之间的‘价格协议’。

speaker: A
sentence: I see many prices here. Which one is right?
zh: 我看到很多价格。哪个是对的？

speaker: A
sentence: It says 'They made a price agreement for the goods.'
zh: 上面写着“他们为这批货物达成了价格协议”。

speaker: A
sentence: I see two different prices on this page. Which one is right?
zh: 我看到这个页面上有两个不同的价格。哪个是对的？

speaker: A
sentence: The first one is from last month. The second is today.
zh: 第一个是上个月的。第二个是今天的。

speaker: B
sentence: Then use the new one. But let's see if the word has a special sense in business.
zh: 那就用新的。但我们看看这个词在商业上有没有特殊意思。

speaker: A
sentence: The first price is from last year. The second is new.
zh: 第一个价格是去年的。第二个是新的。

speaker: A
sentence: Which price is for today?
zh: 哪个价格是今天的？

speaker: A
sentence: But the other is from a different company.
zh: 但另一个是不同公司的。

speaker: B
sentence: Then the price is part of that agreement.
zh: 那价格就是协议的一部分。

speaker: A
sentence: This page is from yesterday. The price is different.
zh: 这个页面是昨天的，价格不一样。

speaker: A
sentence: But the second price is from today. Which one is right?
zh: 但第二个价格是今天的。哪个是对的？

speaker: A
sentence: I will. But there is another page with a different price.
zh: 我会的。但还有另一个页面，价格不同。

speaker: A
sentence: It is from last year. Is that still good?
zh: 是去年的。还有效吗？

speaker: A
sentence: I see another page from this month. Let me open it.
zh: 我看到另一个这个月的页面。我打开看看。

speaker: A
sentence: This page says the price is from a different month. Which one is current?
zh: 这个页面说价格是另一个月的。哪个是当前的？

speaker: A
sentence: This page says the price is for goods from last year.
zh: 这个页面说价格是去年的货。

speaker: A
sentence: It is morning. My friend will come to my house at night.
zh: 早上好。我朋友晚上要来我家吃饭。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The store is open now. I work at the store near your house.
zh: 好的，商店现在开门了。我就在你家附近这家超市上班。

speaker: A
sentence: I come here on foot with a list and a bag.
zh: 我拿着清单和布袋子，步行过来的。

speaker: B
sentence: Good morning. I am the woman here. May I help you today?
zh: 早上好，我是这边的店员。今天需要什么？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. There is no milk in my house. I will make soup before the meal.
zh: 要的。家里牛奶喝完了，开饭前得做汤。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. Milk first, then food for the soup.
zh: 明白了，先拿牛奶，再买做汤的食材。

speaker: A
sentence: Where is the milk? I do not see it on this shelf.
zh: 牛奶在哪？这个货架上我没看见。

speaker: B
sentence: It is near the door, in the cold part. Come with me.
zh: 在门边冷藏那边，跟我来。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will take this milk and some bread.
zh: 谢谢。我买这瓶牛奶，再要些面包。

speaker: B
sentence: The bread is good today. The price is not high.
zh: 今天的面包很好，价格也不贵。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I need fruit and eggs for the soup too.
zh: 好。做汤我还得买水果和鸡蛋。

speaker: B
sentence: The fruit is over there. Let me put it on the table for you.
zh: 水果在那边。我帮你放到台子上。

speaker: A
sentence: This fruit looks good, but the price is a little high for me.
zh: 这水果看着不错，但对我来说有点贵。

speaker: B
sentence: I have the same fruit here. The price is not so high.
zh: 这边有同样的水果，价格没那么高。

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. I will take the fruit. Where are the eggs?
zh: 好，水果我要了。鸡蛋在哪儿？

speaker: B
sentence: The eggs are in the cold part near the milk. Come with me.
zh: 鸡蛋在牛奶旁边的冷柜里，跟我来。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take the eggs. The price is good.
zh: 我买这盒鸡蛋，价格合适。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. You have milk, bread, fruit, and eggs now.
zh: 好。现在有牛奶、面包、水果和鸡蛋了。

speaker: A
sentence: That is good. How do I give the money?
zh: 好。钱怎么给您？

speaker: B
sentence: Give me the money, or put it on the machine by the table.
zh: 给现金，或者在柜台边上用机器付。

speaker: A
sentence: I put the money on the machine. Is it good?
zh: 我在机器上付了。可以了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is good. I will put the food in your bag.
zh: 可以了。我帮你把食物装进袋子里。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. But I see no salt on my list.
zh: 谢谢。但我清单上没有盐。

speaker: B
sentence: Salt is on shelf 5, near the bread. Do you need it?
zh: 盐在五号货架，面包附近，你需要吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I need salt for the soup. Let me get it.
zh: 是的，汤里需要盐，我去拿。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your time. I will keep your bag here.
zh: 不急，你的袋子我先看着。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I am back with the salt. Now I give the money.
zh: 谢谢，盐拿来了，现在付钱。

speaker: B
sentence: The machine is ready. Put your card or money here.
zh: 机器准备好了，放卡或钱在这里。

speaker: A
sentence: I put the money in. Is it done?
zh: 钱放进去了，好了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is right. Here is your change.
zh: 对的，找您零钱。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will go to my house and make the soup now.
zh: 谢谢。我得赶紧回家做汤了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Your friend will have a good meal at night. Goodbye.
zh: 好，你朋友晚上一定能吃上顿好的。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take my machine out now.
zh: 我现在把手机拿出来。

speaker: B
sentence: What do you see on the screen?
zh: 屏幕上显示什么？

speaker: A
sentence: The battery is only at twenty percent.
zh: 电量只剩百分之二十。

speaker: B
sentence: That is low. Will it go dead soon?
zh: 那很低了。会不会很快没电？

speaker: A
sentence: I need to send today's pictures to my friend.
zh: 我得把今天的照片发给朋友。

speaker: B
sentence: Can you do it before the machine shuts down?
zh: 你能在关机前做完吗？

speaker: A
sentence: I will make the pictures smaller to send them faster.
zh: 我把照片缩小，发得快一些。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. How many pictures are there?
zh: 好主意。有多少张照片？

speaker: A
sentence: There are five pictures from this afternoon.
zh: 有五张今天下午拍的照片。

speaker: B
sentence: Will you send them all at once?
zh: 你要一次性全发吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I will send them together now.
zh: 是的，我现在一起发。

speaker: B
sentence: I see the message went through. Good.
zh: 我看到消息发出去了。很好。

speaker: A
sentence: My friend is saying thank you for the pictures.
zh: 我朋友在说谢谢照片。

speaker: B
sentence: Now you have time to put the machine on charge.
zh: 现在你有时间给手机充电了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will get the charging wire from the table.
zh: 我去桌上拿充电线。

speaker: B
sentence: Is the wire long enough to reach the sofa?
zh: 线够长能到沙发吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is long. I will put it into the machine now.
zh: 够长。我现在插上手机。

speaker: B
sentence: Is the other end in the power point?
zh: 另一头插在电源上了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is in. The battery sign is going up.
zh: 插上了。电量图标在上升。

speaker: B
sentence: How long will it take to get full?
zh: 充满需要多久？

speaker: A
sentence: About one hour. I will let it be for now.
zh: 大约一小时。我先放着。

speaker: B
sentence: You can do other things while it is charging.
zh: 充电的时候你可以做别的事。

speaker: A
sentence: I will look at the new messages first.
zh: 我先看看新消息。

speaker: B
sentence: Is there anything important?
zh: 有什么重要的吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, just some group talk. I will put it down.
zh: 没什么，就是群聊。我放下了。

speaker: B
sentence: The battery is now at fifty percent.
zh: 电量现在百分之五十了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take it off charge and put it in my bag.
zh: 我拔掉充电器，放进包里。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. It is ready for tomorrow.
zh: 好。明天可以用了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help tonight.
zh: 谢谢你今晚帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Sleep well.
zh: 不客气。晚安。

speaker: A
sentence: It is Saturday afternoon. I am happy you are here.
zh: 周六下午了。你来了我真高兴。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it has been a long time. How are you?
zh: 是啊，好久不见了。你还好吗？

speaker: A
sentence: I am well. Come in and have a seat.
zh: 我挺好的。快进来坐。

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you. Your house looks the same.
zh: 谢谢。你家看起来还是老样子。

speaker: A
sentence: I have a new job now. I work in an office.
zh: 我现在换了新工作，在办公室上班。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Do you like it?
zh: 那挺好的。你喜欢吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the work is interesting. But I am busier.
zh: 喜欢，工作挺有意思的，就是比以前忙了。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. I am still at the same company.
zh: 明白。我还在原来的公司。

speaker: A
sentence: Let me make some tea for us.
zh: 我来泡点茶吧。

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds good. What kind of tea do you have?
zh: 好啊。你都有什么茶？

speaker: A
sentence: I have green tea and black tea.
zh: 有绿茶和红茶。

speaker: B
sentence: Green tea is fine, thank you.
zh: 绿茶就好，谢谢。

speaker: A
sentence: Here you are. How is your family?
zh: 给你。你家里人怎么样？

speaker: B
sentence: They are all well. My son started school this year.
zh: 都挺好的。我儿子今年上学了。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a big change. He must be happy.
zh: 那变化挺大的。他一定很开心吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, he likes it. He has many new friends.
zh: 是啊，他很喜欢，交了很多新朋友。

speaker: A
sentence: I have a plan for next month. I will go on a short journey.
zh: 我下个月有个计划，打算出去短途旅行。

speaker: B
sentence: Where will you go?
zh: 去哪儿？

speaker: A
sentence: To the mountains. I need a rest from work.
zh: 去山里。工作累了，想休息一下。

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds like a good idea.
zh: 听起来不错。

speaker: A
sentence: Would you like to come with me?
zh: 你想不想一起去？

speaker: B
sentence: I would like that. Let me see my time.
zh: 我很想去。我看看时间。

speaker: A
sentence: It is almost dinner time. Will you have a meal here?
zh: 快到晚饭时间了，你在这儿吃吧？

speaker: B
sentence: Thank you, but I have to go home for dinner.
zh: 谢谢，但我得回家吃饭。

speaker: A
sentence: I understand. Let us meet again soon.
zh: 我明白。那我们改天再聚。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, let us make a plan for next week.
zh: 好，咱们下周约个时间。

speaker: A
sentence: I will send you a message about the journey.
zh: 旅行的事我发消息告诉你。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will wait for your note. Goodbye.
zh: 好，我等你的消息。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: It is 11 at night. I am in bed with my machine.
zh: 晚上十一点了。我躺在床上，拿着手机。

speaker: B
sentence: Are you ready for sleep?
zh: 你准备睡觉了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Not yet. I will look at the network for a short time.
zh: 还没呢。我打算刷一会儿社交网络。

speaker: B
sentence: What do you do on the network?
zh: 你在网上做什么？

speaker: A
sentence: I see pictures from my friends. One friend is at a good place.
zh: 我看朋友们的照片。有个朋友去了一个好地方。

speaker: B
sentence: What place is that?
zh: 什么地方？

speaker: A
sentence: A hill with a river. The view is very beautiful.
zh: 一个有河流的小山。风景很美。

speaker: B
sentence: Did you take a picture there today?
zh: 你今天在那里拍照了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I did. I will put it on the network now.
zh: 拍了。我现在就发到网上。

speaker: B
sentence: What will you say with the picture?
zh: 你配什么文字？

speaker: A
sentence: I will say: A good day at the hill by the river.
zh: 我会写：河边小山上的美好一天。

speaker: B
sentence: That is short and good. Will you make it public?
zh: 简短又好。你设为公开吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, for all my friends to see.
zh: 对，让所有朋友都能看到。

speaker: B
sentence: I see your picture now. It is very nice!
zh: 我看到你的照片了。真好看！

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I am happy you like it.
zh: 谢谢。你喜欢我很开心。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put a comment under it.
zh: 我给你的照片写个评论。

speaker: A
sentence: What will you say?
zh: 你会说什么？

speaker: B
sentence: I will say: Great picture! The river looks so blue.
zh: 我会写：照片太棒了！河水看起来很蓝。

speaker: A
sentence: That is a kind thing to say. I will answer you.
zh: 你这么说真好。我回复你。

speaker: B
sentence: What will your answer be?
zh: 你回复什么？

speaker: A
sentence: I will say: Yes, the water was very clear today.
zh: 我会说：是的，今天的水很清澈。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now you have a talk on your picture.
zh: 好。现在你的照片下面有对话了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is nice to get comments from friends.
zh: 是啊，收到朋友的评论很开心。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have more pictures to put up?
zh: 你还有更多照片要发吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, only this one for today. I am tired now.
zh: 没有了，今天就这一张。我现在累了。

speaker: B
sentence: Then it is time to put the machine down.
zh: 那该放下手机了。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I will turn off the program and go to sleep.
zh: 嗯，我关掉应用就睡觉。

speaker: B
sentence: Good night. Sleep well.
zh: 晚安。睡个好觉。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, let's warm up on the school field first.
zh: 对，我们先在学校操场上热身吧。

speaker: B
