sentence: You will. Now let's start warming up.
zh: 你可以的。现在开始热身吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Stretch your legs well. It will help.
zh: 好好拉伸腿，会有帮助。

speaker: A
sentence: Like this?
zh: 这样吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now walk a bit before running again.
zh: 好，再跑之前先走一走。

speaker: B
sentence: Just do your best. We need you on the field.
zh: 尽力就好，场上需要你。

speaker: A
sentence: Okay, let's start running.
zh: 好，我们开始跑吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Take a short rest. Drink some water.
zh: 休息一下，喝点水。

speaker: A
sentence: Here it comes!
zh: 球来了！

speaker: A
sentence: How much time is left?
zh: 还剩多少时间？

speaker: B
sentence: About ten minutes.
zh: 大约十分钟。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks for pushing me.
zh: 谢谢你推我一把。

speaker: A
sentence: Let's start with some running.
zh: 我们先跑跑步吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Take it slow. We have time.
zh: 慢点来，我们有时间。

speaker: B
sentence: No, keep moving. It will get better.
zh: 别，继续动，会好起来的。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Ready? Go!
zh: 好。准备好了吗？跑！

speaker: A
sentence: I made it! That was hard.
zh: 我做到了！好累。

speaker: B
sentence: Well done. Now let's stretch.
zh: 做得好。现在我们拉伸一下。

speaker: B
sentence: Okay, from this line to that tree.
zh: 好，从这条线到那棵树。

speaker: B
sentence: Take a deep breath. We have time.
zh: 深呼吸，我们还有时间。

speaker: B
sentence: You did the work. Now let's stretch together.
zh: 是你自己做到的。现在一起拉伸吧。

speaker: B
sentence: You did well. Your running got better.
zh: 你表现不错，跑动好多了。

speaker: A
sentence: I was tired at first, but I kept going.
zh: 一开始很累，但我坚持下来了。

speaker: B
sentence: You kept up. Now stretch your legs.
zh: 你跟上了。现在拉拉腿。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, you did well in the end.
zh: 是啊，你最后表现很好。

speaker: B
sentence: Move to the side. I will take him.
zh: 往边上跑，我来防他。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will go with you.
zh: 好，我陪你一起。

speaker: B
sentence: That is normal. Keep your arms moving.
zh: 正常，摆动手臂。

speaker: A
sentence: It is Friday night, nine o'clock. I am free from work for a week.
zh: 周五晚上九点，我一周的工作结束了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. What picture do you want to see on the screen?
zh: 好。你想在屏幕上看什么片子？

speaker: A
sentence: I have not seen any new shows for a week. Let us look at the list.
zh: 我一周没看新节目了。我们看看列表吧。

speaker: B
sentence: This one seems good. It is a story about a man and his machine.
zh: 这个好像不错。讲一个男人和他的机器的故事。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I have heard about it. Let us play it now.
zh: 嗯，我听说过。现在播放吧。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put it on. The first part is starting.
zh: 我来放。第一部分开始了。

speaker: A
sentence: The man is making a long journey in his machine.
zh: 这个男人开着机器做长途旅行。

speaker: B
sentence: He has no oil. He needs to make the oil part full.
zh: 他没油了。他需要加满油箱。

speaker: A
sentence: But he has no money. How will he get the oil?
zh: 但他没钱。他怎么弄到油？

speaker: B
sentence: Maybe he will do work for the station man.
zh: 也许他会给加油站的人干活。

speaker: A
sentence: Let us stop for a minute. I need to get a drink.
zh: 我们暂停一下。我去拿杯饮料。

speaker: B
sentence: Get one for me too, please. I am very interested in this story.
zh: 也帮我拿一杯。我对这个故事很感兴趣。

speaker: A
sentence: Here is your drink. Let us go on with the picture.
zh: 你的饮料。我们继续看片子吧。

speaker: B
sentence: The man is now working at the station. He gets oil for his machine.
zh: 那男人现在在加油站干活。他得到了机器用的油。

speaker: A
sentence: But the station man is not kind. He gives little money.
zh: 但加油站的人不友善。他给的钱很少。

speaker: B
sentence: The man is sad. He goes on his journey with little hope.
zh: 那男人很伤心。他带着很少的希望继续旅程。

speaker: A
sentence: Then he sees a woman by the road. Her machine is broken.
zh: 然后他看见路边有个女人。她的机器坏了。

speaker: B
sentence: He stops to help her. He is a good man.
zh: 他停下来帮她。他是个好人。

speaker: A
sentence: She gives him money for his help. Now he has enough for oil.
zh: 她给他钱作为帮助的回报。现在他有钱买油了。

speaker: B
sentence: The story is teaching us to be kind to others.
zh: 这个故事教我们要对别人友善。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Let us see the end now. I think it will be good.
zh: 是的。我们现在看结尾吧。我觉得会很好。

speaker: B
sentence: The man comes to his house. His family is waiting for him.
zh: 那男人到了家。他的家人在等他。

speaker: A
sentence: He is happy. He has learned a great lesson on his journey.
zh: 他很开心。他在旅途中学到了重要的一课。

speaker: B
sentence: The picture is over. I liked it very much.
zh: 片子结束了。我很喜欢。

speaker: A
sentence: It was a good story. It made me think about being kind.
zh: 这是个好故事。它让我思考友善。

speaker: B
sentence: I will turn off the screen now. It is late.
zh: 我现在关掉屏幕。时间不早了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for watching with me. I had a good time.
zh: 谢谢你陪我看。我过得很愉快。

speaker: B
sentence: Me too. Let us do it again next week. Goodbye.
zh: 我也是。我们下周再一起看。再见。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, come in! The door is open.
zh: 对，进来吧！门没锁。

speaker: B
sentence: Come in! We are all here waiting for you.
zh: 快进来！我们都在等你呢。

speaker: A
sentence: I had no idea! How did you keep it secret?
zh: 我完全不知道！你们怎么保密的？

speaker: B
sentence: Come in! We have a surprise for you.
zh: 进来吧！我们给你准备了一个惊喜。

speaker: A
sentence: What a surprise! All my friends are here!
zh: 真意外！我所有的朋友都在这里！

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you, this is so kind!
zh: 谢谢你们，这太贴心了！

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it was hard! I almost let it out yesterday.
zh: 是啊，很难！我昨天差点说漏嘴了。

speaker: A
sentence: So what did you do?
zh: 那你们怎么办了？

speaker: A
sentence: How did you get all these flowers in here?
zh: 你们怎么弄来这么多花？

speaker: B
sentence: We were very quiet. Even the dog kept still.
zh: 我们特别小声，连狗都没叫。

speaker: A
sentence: And the cake? When did you make it?
zh: 蛋糕呢？什么时候做的？

speaker: B
sentence: We made a cake for you!
zh: 我们给你做了个蛋糕！

speaker: B
sentence: We put it back together. It tastes the same.
zh: 我们把它拼回去了。味道一样。

speaker: A
sentence: I do not care about looks. Thank you all!
zh: 我不在乎样子。谢谢大家！

speaker: A
sentence: Why not? Did you run out of paper?
zh: 为什么？纸用完了？

speaker: A
sentence: I love bright colors! Where is it?
zh: 我就喜欢亮色！在哪儿？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, let me get a knife.
zh: 好，我去拿刀。

speaker: B
sentence: But how did you get here so early? We thought you would be late.
zh: 你怎么这么早就到了？我们还以为你会晚点来。

speaker: A
sentence: Cake? You got me a cake? That is too much!
zh: 蛋糕？你们还给我买了蛋糕？太破费了！

speaker: B
sentence: Almost... now open your eyes!
zh: 快了……现在睁眼！

speaker: B
sentence: Do you like it? We worked all morning.
zh: 喜欢吗？我们忙了一上午。

speaker: A
sentence: I love it! But where is the cake?
zh: 太喜欢了！但蛋糕呢？

speaker: B
sentence: Great! Let me get the drinks too.
zh: 太好了！我去拿饮料。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that was the trick. Now, come see the cake.
zh: 对，那就是个计策。现在，来看看蛋糕吧。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me cut the cake now.
zh: 我现在切蛋糕。

speaker: A
sentence: This is the best surprise ever.
zh: 这是最棒的惊喜了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you all so much.
zh: 非常感谢大家。

speaker: A
sentence: I am so happy right now.
zh: 我现在太开心了。

speaker: B
sentence: We are happy you like it.
zh: 你喜欢我们就开心。

speaker: A
sentence: Good morning. My machine will not open my record.
zh: 早上好。我的电脑打不开文件了。

speaker: B
sentence: What is the trouble? Is the machine on?
zh: 什么问题？电脑开着吗？

speaker: A
sentence: It is on, but the record does not come up.
zh: 开着，但文件打不开。

speaker: B
sentence: I will help you. First, make the machine start again.
zh: 我来帮你。先重启电脑。

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that now. Please wait a minute.
zh: 我现在就重启。请稍等。

speaker: B
sentence: Is the machine starting up now?
zh: 电脑现在启动了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is starting. The picture is coming.
zh: 是的，启动了。画面出来了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now open the record again.
zh: 好的。现在再打开文件。

speaker: A
sentence: I did that. It says there is an error.
zh: 我打开了。它显示有错误。

speaker: B
sentence: What is the error number?
zh: 错误编号是什么？

speaker: A
sentence: It is number 5. The record is damaged.
zh: 是5号。文件损坏了。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. Do you have a copy of the record?
zh: 明白了。你有文件备份吗？

speaker: A
sentence: I put the stick in. It is reading now.
zh: 插进去了。正在读取。

speaker: B
sentence: Is the copy opening?
zh: 备份能打开吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, the copy is open. I see my work.
zh: 能打开。我看到我的工作了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is good. Now make a new copy on the machine.
zh: 那就好。现在在电脑上再保存一份。

speaker: A
sentence: I will do that. I am saving it now.
zh: 好的。我正在保存。

speaker: B
sentence: Is it saved?
zh: 保存好了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is saved. The record is working.
zh: 保存好了。文件能用了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. You can send it this afternoon.
zh: 好的。下午可以发送了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help. I will send it now.
zh: 谢谢你的帮助。我现在就发。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a good day. Goodbye.
zh: 不客气。祝您愉快。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: My foot is hurt. I was running.
zh: 我的脚受伤了。我刚才在跑步。

speaker: B
sentence: Sit down and let me see your foot.
zh: 坐下来，让我看看你的脚。

speaker: A
sentence: This is my foot. It is red here.
zh: 这是我的脚。这里红了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is the foot. It is a little big.
zh: 对，这是脚。有点肿了。

speaker: A
sentence: My head is not hurt. Only my foot.
zh: 我的头没受伤。只有脚。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now touch your hand to your foot.
zh: 好。现在用手碰一下脚。

speaker: A
sentence: I touch my foot with my hand. It is sore.
zh: 我用手碰脚。很疼。

speaker: B
sentence: Your hand is fine. The foot is the problem.
zh: 你的手没问题。脚是问题所在。

speaker: A
sentence: Where is the pain? Here on the side?
zh: 哪里疼？是这里侧面吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is the ankle. It is twisted.
zh: 对，那是脚踝。扭伤了。

speaker: A
sentence: It hurts when I move it. A sharp pain.
zh: 一动就疼。一阵剧痛。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not move it now. Rest it on this.
zh: 现在别动。放在这个上面休息。

speaker: A
sentence: I have a test tomorrow. I am worried.
zh: 我明天有考试。我很担心。

speaker: B
sentence: The test is for running? Or for writing?
zh: 考试是跑步还是写字？

speaker: A
sentence: It is a running test. I need to run fast.
zh: 是跑步考试。我需要跑得快。

speaker: B
sentence: Then you must not run tomorrow. Rest it.
zh: 那你明天不能跑。让它休息。

speaker: A
sentence: But I will get a low mark. What can I do?
zh: 但我会得低分。我该怎么办？

speaker: B
sentence: Tell your teacher about your foot. He will see.
zh: 告诉老师你的脚。他会理解的。

speaker: A
sentence: I feel a dull pain now, not sharp.
zh: 现在感觉钝痛，不是刺痛了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good sign. Ice will help.
zh: 这是好迹象。冰敷会有帮助。

speaker: A
sentence: Ice on my foot? How long?
zh: 冰敷脚？敷多久？

speaker: B
sentence: Ten minutes. Then rest for the day.
zh: 十分钟。然后今天休息。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put ice on it now. Thank you.
zh: 我现在就敷冰。谢谢你。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Keep your foot up.
zh: 不客气。把脚抬高。

speaker: A
sentence: So this is my foot, and this is my ankle.
zh: 所以这是脚，这是脚踝。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, you have the names right.
zh: 对，名称说对了。

speaker: A
sentence: Head, hand, foot, ankle. I will remember.
zh: 头、手、脚、脚踝。我会记住的。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Rest now and get better.
zh: 好。现在休息，早日康复。

speaker: A
sentence: I will go to my class now. Goodbye.
zh: 我现在回教室了。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: Mother, I am back. The food is on the table.
zh: 妈，我回来了。饭菜都摆好了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Sit down and have a meal with us.
zh: 好，坐下一起吃吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Father and brother are not here?
zh: 爸和弟弟不在？

speaker: B
sentence: Father is coming. Brother is in his room.
zh: 你爸马上来。弟弟在房间呢。

speaker: A
sentence: I will go and get him.
zh: 我去叫他。

speaker: B
sentence: No need. He will come out for food.
zh: 不用，他吃饭会出来的。

speaker: A
sentence: Mother, I have a journey this week.
zh: 妈，我这周要出差。

speaker: B
sentence: Oh? How long will you be away?
zh: 哦？去几天？

speaker: A
sentence: Three days. From Monday to Wednesday.
zh: 三天，周一到周三。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. Take care of yourself on the road.
zh: 知道了，路上注意安全。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. But I need to make some things ready before I go.
zh: 嗯。但走之前有些事要安排好。

speaker: B
sentence: What things? Tell me.
zh: 什么事？你说。

speaker: A
sentence: The water pipe in the kitchen is broken. I will send a man to fix it tomorrow.
zh: 厨房的水管坏了，我明天叫人来修。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I saw water on the floor this morning.
zh: 好，今早我见地板上都是水。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Also, brother's school needs a paper signed by you.
zh: 嗯。还有，弟弟学校要你签个字。

speaker: B
sentence: I will do it after the meal. Where is the paper?
zh: 吃完饭就签。纸在哪里？

speaker: A
sentence: On the table near the door.
zh: 在门边的桌子上。

speaker: B
sentence: I see it. I will sign it later.
zh: 看到了，我一会儿签。

speaker: A
sentence: And the money for the electric bill — I will give it to you now.
zh: 还有电费的钱，我现在给你。

speaker: B
sentence: Keep it. I have enough money for this month.
zh: 你留着吧，这个月的钱够用。

speaker: A
sentence: Are you certain? I do not need it for the journey.
zh: 你确定？我出差用不上。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, I am certain. You take care of your own needs.
zh: 确定。你自己照顾好自己就行。

speaker: A
sentence: All right. Then I will go and get the bags ready after the meal.
zh: 好吧。那我吃完饭去收拾行李。

speaker: B
sentence: I will help you with the bags.
zh: 我帮你一起收。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you, mother. You are very kind.
zh: 谢谢妈，你真好。

speaker: B
sentence: It is nothing. Now let us finish our meal.
zh: 没事。先吃饭吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I am done. I will take the plates to the kitchen.
zh: 我吃好了，把碗收去厨房。

speaker: B
sentence: I will do it. You go and get your bags ready.
zh: 我来收，你去收拾行李吧。

speaker: A
sentence: All right. Good night, mother.
zh: 好。晚安，妈。

speaker: A
sentence: I open the door and put my bag down.
zh: 我打开门，放下包。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The house is dirty. We have work to do.
zh: 好的。房子很脏，我们有活要干。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, a friend will come at night. Let's make it clean.
zh: 是的，朋友晚上要来。我们把它打扫干净。

speaker: B
sentence: First, I will make food in the kitchen.
zh: 我先在厨房做饭。

speaker: A
sentence: I will clean the living room. Where is the cloth?
zh: 我来打扫客厅。抹布在哪儿？

speaker: B
sentence: It is under the table. I have rice and eggs.
zh: 在桌子下面。我有米和鸡蛋。

speaker: A
sentence: I see it. I will take the dust off the books.
zh: 我看见了。我把书上的灰擦掉。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I put water in the pot for the rice.
zh: 好。我把水放进锅里煮饭。

speaker: A
sentence: The floor is covered with paper. I will put it in order.
zh: 地上全是纸。我来整理一下。

speaker: B
sentence: The eggs are ready. I will make a simple meal.
zh: 鸡蛋好了。我做个简单的菜。

speaker: A
sentence: I put the paper in a box. The room looks better.
zh: 我把纸放进盒子里。房间看起来好多了。

speaker: B
sentence: The food is done. Let's have a rest and eat.
zh: 饭做好了。我们休息一下，吃点东西。

speaker: A
sentence: This is good. I am tired from cleaning.
zh: 这很好。我打扫累了。

speaker: B
sentence: After eating, we will do the bedroom.
zh: 吃完后，我们整理卧室。

speaker: A
sentence: I will take the dishes to the kitchen.
zh: 我把碗拿到厨房去。

speaker: B
sentence: I will get the cloth for the bedroom.
zh: 我去拿卧室的抹布。

speaker: A
sentence: The bed is not straight. Let's make it smooth.
zh: 床不整齐。我们把它铺平。

speaker: B
sentence: I will put the pillows in their right place.
zh: 我把枕头放好。

speaker: A
sentence: The window is dirty. I will clean it with water.
zh: 窗户脏了。我用水擦一下。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Then the room will be bright.
zh: 好。这样房间就亮了。

speaker: A
sentence: I am done. Let's go back to the living room.
zh: 我弄完了。我们回客厅吧。

speaker: B
sentence: The house is clean now. We can have a rest.
zh: 房子现在干净了。我们可以休息一下。

speaker: A
sentence: I will make tea for us.
zh: 我来泡茶。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. I am happy with the work.
zh: 好主意。我对这活很满意。

speaker: A
sentence: The friend will come in one hour.
zh: 朋友一小时后到。

speaker: B
sentence: Then we have time to get ready.
zh: 那我们还有时间准备。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put on a clean shirt.
zh: 我去换件干净衬衫。

speaker: B
sentence: I will make the table ready for the meal.
zh: 我把桌子摆好准备吃饭。

speaker: A
sentence: Everything is in order. Thank you for your help.
zh: 一切都井井有条。谢谢你的帮忙。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. It was a good day.
zh: 不客气。今天过得不错。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes. Now I will go to the door. Goodbye.
zh: 是的。现在我去门口。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: The sky is dark. Do you see clouds?
zh: 天好暗。你看到云了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, there are many grey clouds. It may rain.
zh: 看到了，好多乌云。可能会下雨。

speaker: A
sentence: I have a meeting at work this morning.
zh: 我今天早上有个会议。

speaker: B
sentence: The weather report says change in the afternoon.
zh: 天气预报说下午会变天。

speaker: A
sentence: I am afraid of getting wet on my way back.
zh: 我怕下班路上淋雨。

speaker: B
sentence: Take a coat and an umbrella with you.
zh: 你带件外套和伞吧。

speaker: A
sentence: Which coat is best for this weather?
zh: 这种天气穿哪件外套好？

speaker: B
sentence: The blue one is light but keeps water out.
zh: 那件蓝色的轻便又防水。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put it on now. Is the umbrella here?
zh: 我现在穿上。伞在哪儿？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, by the door. It is a strong one.
zh: 在门边，那把很结实。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will take it. What about shoes?
zh: 好的，我带上。鞋子呢？

speaker: B
sentence: Wear the black shoes. They are not wet.
zh: 穿那双黑的，不湿脚。

speaker: A
sentence: I will get them from the room.
zh: 我去房间拿。

speaker: B
sentence: Do you have a bag for the umbrella?
zh: 你有装伞的袋子吗？

speaker: A
sentence: No, but I can put it in my work bag.
zh: 没有，但我可以放工作包里。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. The bag is strong.
zh: 好主意，那包很结实。

speaker: A
sentence: I am ready now. The coat and umbrella are with me.
zh: 我准备好了，外套和伞都带了。

speaker: B
sentence: Wait, the wind is strong. Take a hat too.
zh: 等等，风很大，再带个帽子。

speaker: A
sentence: Where is my grey hat?
zh: 我的灰帽子在哪儿？

speaker: B
sentence: On the shelf. I will get it for you.
zh: 在架子上，我帮你拿。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. That is very kind.
zh: 谢谢，你真好。

speaker: B
sentence: Here it is. Put it on and see.
zh: 给你，戴上看看。

speaker: A
sentence: It is a good size. I will keep it on.
zh: 大小合适，我就戴着。

speaker: B
sentence: Now you are ready for any weather.
zh: 现在什么天气都不怕了。

speaker: A
sentence: I will go now. The bus comes at seven thirty.
zh: 我走了，公交车七点半来。

speaker: B
sentence: Have a good day at work.
zh: 工作顺利。

speaker: A
sentence: I will come back before the rain gets hard.
zh: 我会在下大雨前回来。

speaker: B
sentence: Goodbye. Take care on the road.
zh: 再见，路上小心。

speaker: A
sentence: Are you free this weekend? I want to meet you.
zh: 你这周末有空吗？我想见你。

speaker: B
sentence: I have work on Saturday. Sunday is free.
zh: 我周六上班，周日有空。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. Let us meet on Sunday afternoon.
zh: 好的。那我们周日下午见。

speaker: B
sentence: What time is best for you?
zh: 你什么时间最方便？

speaker: A
sentence: How about 2 o'clock?
zh: 两点怎么样？

speaker: B
sentence: I have a lunch at 12. 2 o'clock is good.
zh: 我十二点有个午餐，两点可以。

speaker: A
sentence: Where shall we meet?
zh: 我们在哪里见？

speaker: B
sentence: How about the coffee shop near your office?
zh: 你办公室附近的咖啡店怎么样？

speaker: A
sentence: That is a good place. I know it.
zh: 那地方不错，我知道。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me put it on my calendar.
zh: 我把它记在日历上。

speaker: A
sentence: I will do the same. Sunday, 2 o'clock, coffee shop.
zh: 我也记一下。周日两点，咖啡店。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is right. See you then.
zh: 是的，没错。到时候见。

speaker: A
sentence: I am at the bus stop. Which bus goes to the center?
zh: 我在公交站。哪路车去市中心？

speaker: B
sentence: Take bus number 12. It goes to the center.
zh: 坐12路。它到市中心。

speaker: A
sentence: Is this the right direction? I need to get to the office.
zh: 这个方向对吗？我要去公司。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the bus comes from the east. You are on the right side.
zh: 对，车从东边来。你在正确的一边。

speaker: A
sentence: How long does it take to get there?
zh: 到那里要多久？

speaker: B
sentence: About 20 minutes, but traffic is heavy now.
zh: 大概20分钟，但现在堵车。

speaker: A
sentence: I have a meeting at nine. I hope I am not late.
zh: 我九点开会。希望不会迟到。

speaker: B
sentence: The bus is coming. Get your card ready.
zh: 车来了。准备好卡。

speaker: A
sentence: I have my card. Do I need to tap it here?
zh: 我有卡。在这里刷吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, tap it on the reader near the door.
zh: 对，在门边的机器上刷。

speaker: A
sentence: I tapped it. The light is green. Is that good?
zh: 刷了。灯变绿。好了吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, you are done. Take a seat.
zh: 好了，找个位子坐。

speaker: A
sentence: I will sit here. How many stops to the center?
zh: 我坐这儿。到市中心有几站？

speaker: B
sentence: Five stops. I will tell you when to get off.
zh: 五站。到站我告诉你。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I am new to this route.
zh: 谢谢。我第一次走这条线。

speaker: B
sentence: No problem. Look at the map above the door.
zh: 没问题。看门上的地图。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the names. The third stop is the market.
zh: 我看到了。第三站是市场。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, then the next is the office area.
zh: 对，然后下一站是办公区。

speaker: A
sentence: I need to get off at the fifth stop. Is that the center?
zh: 我要在第五站下车。那是市中心吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, the bus ends there. You will see tall buildings.
zh: 对，车到终点。你会看到高楼。

speaker: A
sentence: I will press the bell before the stop.
zh: 到站前我会按铃。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Press it now, the next stop is yours.
zh: 好。现在按，下一站就是你的。

speaker: A
sentence: I pressed it. The bell rang.
zh: 我按了。铃响了。

speaker: B
sentence: The bus is stopping. Get ready to go out.
zh: 车停了。准备下车。

speaker: A
sentence: I am at the door. Thank you for your help.
zh: 我到门口了。谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Your office is on the left.
zh: 不客气。你公司在左边。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the building. I will go now.
zh: 我看到大楼了。我走了。

speaker: B
sentence: Have a good meeting. Goodbye.
zh: 开会顺利。再见。

speaker: A
sentence: I need a ticket to the next town for today.
zh: 我要买一张今天去邻城的票。

speaker: B
sentence: The train goes at ten in the morning. Here is your ticket.
zh: 火车上午十点发车。这是您的票。

speaker: A
sentence: What time is it now? I am afraid to be late.
zh: 现在几点了？我怕来不及。

speaker: B
sentence: It is half past nine. You have time to go to the door.
zh: 九点半。您还有时间进站。

speaker: A
sentence: I have my bag and my paper. Which way is the train?
zh: 我带着包和证件。火车往哪边走？

speaker: B
sentence: Go through that door and down the steps. The train is there.
zh: 穿过那道门，下台阶，火车就在那儿。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you. I will go quickly.
zh: 谢谢。我快走。

speaker: B
sentence: Have a good journey.
zh: 祝您旅途愉快。

speaker: A
sentence: I am on the train. Is this seat free?
zh: 我上车了。这个座位空着吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, you may take that seat. Put your bag up there.
zh: 是的，您可以坐这里。把包放上面。

speaker: A
sentence: I put my bag on the shelf. It is safe there.
zh: 我把包放在架子上。那儿安全。

speaker: B
sentence: The train is moving now. We will be there in two hours.
zh: 火车现在开了。两小时后到。

speaker: A
sentence: The land outside is green. I see fields and houses.
zh: 外面的地是绿的。我看见田野和房子。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, this is a beautiful part of the country.
zh: 是的，这是乡村美丽的一段。

speaker: A
sentence: I am going to see my friend for the first time.
zh: 我第一次去看我的朋友。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a happy thing. Do you have his address?
zh: 那是件高兴的事。你有他的地址吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I have it in my bag. He will come to the station.
zh: 有，在我包里。他会来车站接我。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. The train will be on time.
zh: 好的。火车会准时到。

speaker: A
sentence: What is the name of the next station?
zh: 下一站叫什么名字？

speaker: B
sentence: That is my town. But you go one more stop.
zh: 那是我的镇。但您要多坐一站。

speaker: A
sentence: I will keep my eyes open for the name.
zh: 我会留意站名。

speaker: B
sentence: The train is slow now. We are near your station.
zh: 火车现在慢了。快到您的站了。

speaker: A
sentence: I see the name on the building. This is my stop.
zh: 我看见楼上的站名了。就是这站。

speaker: B
sentence: Take your bag down. The door is open.
zh: 拿下您的包。门开了。

speaker: A
sentence: I have my bag. I am ready to get off.
zh: 我拿着包。准备下车。

speaker: B
sentence: Step down carefully. Your friend is waiting.
zh: 小心下车。您的朋友在等。

speaker: A
sentence: I see my friend over there. Thank you for your help.
zh: 我看见朋友在那边。谢谢您的帮助。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Have a good time with your friend. Goodbye.
zh: 不客气。祝您和朋友玩得开心。再见。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, we are waiting. Your mother is here too.
zh: 是啊，我们在等着呢。你妈妈也在。

speaker: B
sentence: We see your face now. Hello, son!
zh: 我们看到你的脸了。你好，儿子！

speaker: B
sentence: We look forward to seeing you. How is everything?
zh: 我们期待见到你。一切都好吗？

speaker: B
sentence: We see you. Your mother is smiling.
zh: 我们看到你了。你妈妈在笑呢。

speaker: B
sentence: We miss you too. How is work?
zh: 我们也想你。工作怎么样？

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks. By the way, I sent you some money last week.
zh: 谢谢。对了，我上周给你们寄了点钱。

speaker: B
sentence: We got it. But you don't need to send money. Keep it.
zh: 收到了。但不用寄钱，你自己留着。

speaker: B
sentence: We see you too. You look tired. Are you sleeping well?
zh: 我们也看到你了。你看起来很累，睡得好吗？

speaker: B
sentence: About two hundred. But keep your money. We have enough.
zh: 大概两百块。但钱你留着吧，我们够用。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, yesterday. The nuts and dried fruit are very good.
zh: 收到了，昨天到的。坚果和干果很好吃。

speaker: B
sentence: We see your room. It looks clean.
zh: 我们看到你的房间了，挺干净的。

speaker: B
sentence: That would be great. We will keep the room ready.
zh: 那太好了。我们会把房间准备好。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I got it. The dried fish was very good. Thank you.
zh: 收到了。鱼干很好吃，谢谢。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that works. We will be waiting.
zh: 好，没问题。我们会等的。

speaker: B
sentence: When will you come back? We have not seen you for a long time.
zh: 你什么时候回来？我们好久没见你了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, we got it. Thank you, son. But you don't have to send so much.
zh: 收到了，谢谢儿子。但不用寄这么多。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I sent some money last week, did you get it?
zh: 那就好。我上周寄了些钱，收到了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Oh, I miss your cooking. What did you make?
zh: 哦，我想念你做的菜。做了什么？

speaker: B
sentence: We are waving to you.
zh: 我们在跟你挥手呢。

speaker: B
sentence: We love you, son.
zh: 我们爱你，儿子。

speaker: B
sentence: We love you.
zh: 我们爱你。

speaker: B
sentence: That sounds good. We will be waiting.
zh: 听起来不错。我们会等的。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, we see you too. But your voice is a little low.
zh: 嗯，我们也看到你了。但你声音有点小。

speaker: B
sentence: Here she is. She is waving at you.
zh: 她来了，她在跟你挥手呢。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it came yesterday. The nuts are very good. But the box was a bit broken.
zh: 到了，昨天到的。坚果很好吃。但盒子有点破了。

speaker: A
sentence: What trouble? Did they take a part of it?
zh: 什么麻烦？他们扣了一部分吗？

speaker: B
sentence: No, they said the name on the paper was not clear. But we fixed it.
zh: 没有，他们说单子上的名字不清楚。不过我们已经解决了。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it came yesterday. The nuts are very good. But the box was a little damaged.
zh: 到了，昨天到的。坚果很好吃。但是盒子有点坏了。

speaker: A
sentence: The network is not working. I have no connection.
zh: 网络坏了，连不上了。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see your machine. Is it on?
zh: 让我看看你的手机，开机了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, it is on. But no sign of the network.
zh: 开着呢，但没显示网络。

speaker: B
sentence: Maybe the box is off. I will look at it.
zh: 可能是路由器关了，我去看看。

speaker: A
sentence: The game will start in five minutes. I am sad.
zh: 比赛五分钟后开始，真烦。

speaker: B
sentence: The box has a light. It is green, so it is working.
zh: 路由器灯是绿的，说明在工作。

speaker: A
sentence: Then why is my machine not getting the network?
zh: 那为什么我的手机连不上？

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see your list of networks.
zh: 让我看看你手机上的网络列表。

speaker: A
sentence: Here it is. I see many names, but not mine.
zh: 这里，有很多名字，但没有我的。

speaker: B
sentence: What is the name of your network?
zh: 你的网络叫什么名字？

speaker: B
sentence: Maybe it is hidden. I will get the box's number.
zh: 可能隐藏了，我去看路由器上的编号。

speaker: A
sentence: The number is on the back. I will give it to you.
zh: 编号在背面，我给你。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. I will put the number into your machine.
zh: 好，我把编号输进你的手机。

speaker: A
sentence: Now I see a new name on the list. Is that it?
zh: 现在列表里出现一个新名字，是它吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, that is the network. Let us put in the secret word.
zh: 对，就是它。输入密码吧。

speaker: A
sentence: I do not have the secret word. Do you have it?
zh: 我不知道密码，你知道吗？

speaker: B
sentence: It is on the box. I will read it for you.
zh: 密码在路由器上，我念给你听。

speaker: A
sentence: Please say it slowly. I will put it in.
zh: 请慢点说，我输进去。

speaker: A
sentence: I put it in. But it says the word is wrong.
zh: 我输了，但显示密码错误。

speaker: B
sentence: Let me see the box again. Oh, the word has a special sign.
zh: 我再看看路由器，哦，密码有个特殊符号。

speaker: A
sentence: What sign? Please tell me.
zh: 什么符号？快告诉我。

speaker: B
sentence: It is a star after the four. So it is 1234*.
zh: 4后面有个星号，所以是1234*。

speaker: A
sentence: I will put that in now.
zh: 我现在输进去。

speaker: B
sentence: Does it say connected?
zh: 显示连接成功了吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes! It says connected. The network is working.
zh: 连上了！网络可以用了。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Now you can see the game.
zh: 好了，现在你可以看比赛了。

speaker: A
sentence: I am opening the page. The game is starting. Thank you!
zh: 我打开网页了，比赛开始了。谢谢！

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. Enjoy the game. Goodbye.
zh: 不客气，好好看比赛。再见。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, please put your bag here.
zh: 是的，请把包放这里。

speaker: A
sentence: What do I need to do with it?
zh: 我需要用它做什么？

speaker: B
sentence: Which numbers? Let me see.
zh: 哪些数字？让我看看。

speaker: A
sentence: Any changes needed?
zh: 需要修改吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Just one small error on page 2.
zh: 第二页有一个小错误。

speaker: B
sentence: You did well for your first day.
zh: 你第一天做得很好。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help.
zh: 谢谢你的帮助。

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, have a good evening.
zh: 好的，晚上愉快。

speaker: A
sentence: What is it about?
zh: 关于什么的？

speaker: B
sentence: One page, with a table.
zh: 一页，带一个表格。

speaker: A
sentence: Got it. I will start on it now.
zh: 明白。我现在就开始。

speaker: A
sentence: I have a question about the numbers.
zh: 关于数字我有个问题。

speaker: B
sentence: What is it?
zh: 什么问题？

speaker: A
sentence: Okay, I will do that.
zh: 好的，我会那样做。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks, I will.
zh: 谢谢，我会的。

speaker: A
sentence: Like this?
zh: 像这样？

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks again.
zh: 再次感谢。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome.
zh: 不客气。

speaker: B
sentence: Here it is. Let's go through it.
zh: 给你。我们过一遍。

speaker: A
sentence: Line one is 200, line two is 150.
zh: 第一行是200，第二行是150。

speaker: B
sentence: That makes 350. Then line three is 100.
zh: 那就是350。然后第三行是100。

speaker: B
sentence: Tomorrow morning.
zh: 明天早上。

speaker: B
sentence: You too. Get some rest.
zh: 你也是。好好休息。

speaker: A
sentence: I will. Get some rest.
zh: 我会的。早点休息。

speaker: B
sentence: You too.
zh: 你也是。

speaker: B
sentence: I will go now.
zh: 我先走了。

speaker: A
sentence: Thanks.
zh: 谢谢。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for teaching me today.
zh: 谢谢你今天教我。

speaker: B
sentence: It was my pleasure.
zh: 这是我的荣幸。

speaker: A
sentence: I will be here at nine tomorrow.
zh: 我明天九点到。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, same time.
zh: 是的，同一时间。

speaker: A
sentence: Have a good evening.
zh: 晚上好。

speaker: B
sentence: You too. Have a good evening.
zh: 你也是。晚上愉快。

speaker: A
sentence: You too.
zh: 你也是。

speaker: B
sentence: See you.
zh: 再见。

speaker: A
sentence: Good afternoon. Is this the tooth office?
zh: 下午好。请问是牙科诊所吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, it is. How may I help you?
zh: 是的。有什么可以帮您？

speaker: A
sentence: I need to see the man about my tooth.
zh: 我需要看牙医。

speaker: B
sentence: What is the trouble?
zh: 有什么问题？

speaker: A
sentence: I have pain in my mouth for two days.
zh: 我牙疼两天了。

speaker: B
sentence: That is not good. Were you here before?
zh: 那不太好。您以前来过吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Yes, I came last year. I need a time tomorrow.
zh: 来过，去年来的。我需要约明天的时间。

speaker: B
sentence: I see. Let me see the list for tomorrow.
zh: 明白。我看看明天的预约表。

speaker: A
sentence: I have a long journey the day after. I must come tomorrow morning.
zh: 我后天要出差，必须明天上午来。

speaker: B
sentence: Tomorrow morning at nine is free. Is that good?
zh: 明天上午九点有空。可以吗？

speaker: A
sentence: Nine is good. Where is the office again?
zh: 九点可以。诊所地址在哪？

speaker: B
sentence: It is on Green Street, near the long road.
zh: 在格林街，靠近大路。

speaker: A
sentence: I remember that place. I was there last year.
zh: 我记得那个地方。去年去过。

speaker: B
sentence: Good. Please come ten minutes before nine.
zh: 好的。请九点前十分钟到。

speaker: A
sentence: I will come early. Will the man see me tomorrow?
zh: 我会早到。医生明天会看诊吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, he will look at your mouth and give help.
zh: 是的，他会检查并治疗。

speaker: A
sentence: The pain is bad when I take food.
zh: 吃饭时疼得厉害。

speaker: B
sentence: Do not take hard food at night. Take soft food and water.
zh: 晚上别吃硬东西，吃软食喝水。

speaker: A
sentence: Put my name on the list, please.
zh: 请把我的名字记上。

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, tomorrow at nine. I will put you on the list now.
zh: 好的，明天九点。我现在就记上。

speaker: A
sentence: If I am late, may I talk to you again on this number?
zh: 如果迟到，可以再打这个电话吗？

speaker: B
sentence: Yes, give this number again if your time changes.
zh: 可以，时间有变就打这个电话。

speaker: A
sentence: Good. I will put the time on my paper now.
zh: 好的。我现在记下时间。

speaker: B
sentence: That is a good idea. The office is not open after five today.
zh: 好主意。诊所今天五点下班。

speaker: A
sentence: Thank you for your help. I am better now.
zh: 谢谢你的帮助。我现在好多了。

speaker: B
sentence: You are welcome. We will see you tomorrow morning.
zh: 不客气。我们明天上午见。

speaker: A
sentence: Goodbye. I will end the talk now.
zh: 再见。我挂电话了。

speaker: B
sentence: Goodbye. Take care.
zh: 再见。保重。
